programme.title: Iidsed tulnukad
programme.desc: Piibli patriarhidest kuni hiljuti tulnukate poolt röövituteni on alati olnud inimesi, kes on väitnud, et on olnud ühenduses olenditega teispoolsusest. Kas nad võivad olla välja valitud maavälise tegevuskava teostamiseks?

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Rick Harrison koos oma perega on Las Vegases asuva pandimaja omanikud. Sari "Pandikunnid" jälgib mida põnevat pandimajja tuuakse ning mida müüakse. Käib pidev tingimine hindade üle ning aeg-ajalt satub pandimajja ka väga väärtuslikke esemeid.

programme.title: Oak Islandi needus
programme.desc: Nova Scotia ranniku lähedal paikneb väike saar, mis peidab endas mõistatuslikku saladust. 18. sajandil märgati seal öösiti kummalisi tulesid.

programme.title: William Shatneriga seletamatutes paikades
programme.desc: Mõned inimesed on võimelised näiliselt võimatuteks asjadeks: nad suudavad üle elada külmakraade, sukelduda ühe hingetõmbega mõõtmatutesse sügavustesse või tõsta meeletult raskeid esemeid. Treening, tahtejõud, geneetika või midagi salapärasemat?

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Rick Harrison koos oma perega on Las Vegases asuva pandimaja omanikud. Sari "Pandikunnid" jälgib mida põnevat pandimajja tuuakse ning mida müüakse. Käib pidev tingimine hindade üle ning aeg-ajalt satub pandimajja ka väga väärtuslikke esemeid.

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Kui klient tuleb poodi koos kaameraga, millega on tehtud esimesed ülesvõtted Elvisest, kas Rick ja Corey sõlmivad siis hea tehingu või tagastavad kauba? Seejärel püüab Chum välja kaevata infot salapärase fossiili kohta.

programme.title: Iidsed tulnukad
programme.desc: Auhinnatud ajakirjanik Linda Moulton Howe on üle nelja aastakümne kajastanud kõige salapärasemaid nähtusi Maal. Kas ta uurimused veidratest loomasurmadest kujutisteni viljapõldudel ja tulnukate röövimisteni võivad viia meid uue, sügava reaalsuseni?

programme.title: Kuidas seda selgitada?
programme.desc: Kas Itaalia luurelendur jäädvustas 1979. aastal ehtsad UFO-fotod? Kas neitsi Maarja kuju, mis väidetavalt nutab ja veritseb peopesadest, on tõendiks imest? Kuidas saab peata kala jätkata ujumist ja kas see on mingi zombi?

programme.title: Oak Islandi needus
programme.desc: Nova Scotia ranniku lähedal paikneb väike saar, mis peidab endas mõistatuslikku saladust. 18. sajandil märgati seal öösiti kummalisi tulesid.

programme.title: William Shatneriga seletamatutes paikades
programme.desc: Suur üleujutus. Egiptuse katkud. Soodoma ja Gomorra. Punase mere poolitamine Moosese poolt. Kas need on pelgalt muinasjutud või võivad need olla ajalooliselt täpsed? Kui jah, siis kas need olid kummalised sündmused või Jumala teod?

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Kui Alice Cooperi poolt väidetavalt kantud riietus letile jõuab, on laulmise aeg möödas, kui Rick tehingut sõlmida üritab. Seejärel muutub Chum palgasõduriks, kui teeb pakkumise kahemeetrise Deadpooli PEZ-dosaatori eest.

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Pandimajja saabub müüja kokarõivastega, mille on signeerinud näitleja, kes mängis kuulsat supinatsi sarjas "Seinfeld". Kas Rick ja Chum ütlevad "Tehing jääb ära!" või jõuavad nad hinna osas kokkuleppele?

programme.title: Iidsed tulnukad
programme.desc: Piibli patriarhidest kuni hiljuti tulnukate poolt röövituteni on alati olnud inimesi, kes on väitnud, et on olnud ühenduses olenditega teispoolsusest. Kas nad võivad olla välja valitud maavälise tegevuskava teostamiseks?

programme.title: Tules karastunud
programme.desc: Sarja neljast nn "ülisuurest" osast esimeses peavad neli seppa valmistama hiiglaslikust raudteerööpast saadud terasest isikupärased suured terarelvad. Milline sepp suudab selle ülisuure väljakutsega toime tulla ja 10 000 dollarit koju viia?

programme.title: Kuidas seda selgitada?
programme.desc: Kas üks mees Türgis jäädvustas kaadrid UFO-pilootidest kokpitis? Mis on need kummalised tuled, mida on Põhja-Carolinas asuva Brown Mountaini kohal korduvalt täheldatud juba enne kodusõda? Kas Austraalia mees komistas kõnniteel tulnuka surnukeha otsa?

programme.title: Iidsed tulnukad
programme.desc: Iidsete astronautide teooria pooldajad on oletanud, et paljud jumalikud olendid, keda maailma eri kultuurid kujutanud on, polegi jumalikud ega mütloogilised, vaid viitavad maaväliste olendite külaskäikudele, mida meie esivanemad ei mõistnud.

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Rick ja Chum koguvad punkte, katsetades kaupu pinball'i-paradiisis. Corey istub sadulasse ühele esemele teisest maailmasõjast, Chum avastab müügis olevad haruldased Sherlock Holmesi raamatud. Rick tervitab džunglis Guns N' Roses'i kitarristi ASHBAt.

programme.title: Kuidas seda selgitada?
programme.desc: Kas see äsja leitud filmimaterjal 1970ndatest aastatest on tõestuseks, et Louisiana soodes elab Sasquatch? Mis lugu on seotud viimasel ajal märgatud lendavate keradega ja kas me peaksime muretsema?

programme.title: Oak Islandi needus
programme.desc: Nova Scotia ranniku lähedal paikneb väike saar, mis peidab endas mõistatuslikku saladust. 18. sajandil märgati seal öösiti kummalisi tulesid.

programme.title: William Shatneriga seletamatutes paikades
programme.desc: Loomariik on täis surmavaid kiskjaid ja mõned neist ründavad erakordsetel ja seletamatutel viisidel. Kuid kas mõned loomad ründavad inimesi ka muudel põhjustel kui tavaline kaitse ja nälg?

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Kui müüja toob poodi E.T. filmiplakati trükiproovi, helistab Chum oma eksperdile, et nõu küsida. Kas ta suudab sõlmida ebamaise tehingu? Seejärel viivad Rick ja Corey Ameerika kodusõja aegse vintpüssi lasketiiru.

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Chum loodab kõike muud kui sinist perioodi, kui ta teeb sürrealistliku pakkumise Salvador Dali litograafiale Pablo Picassost. Seejärel on Rick valmis uut tehingut tegema, kui müüja toob Franklin Roosevelti "Lõkkejuttude" salvestused.

programme.title: Iidsed tulnukad
programme.desc: Puma Punkus Boliivias asuvad ühed maailma suurimad kiviplokid, mis on kõik raiutud uskumatu täpsusega. Kas uued tehnoloogilised edusammud võivad aidata lahendada sajandeid vana mõistatuse ja pakkuda tõendeid tulnukate sekkumisest Maal?

programme.title: William Shatneriga seletamatutes paikades
programme.desc: Iga inimese reaalsus erineb pisut, ent oleme ühel meelel, et taevas on sinine, sidrunid hapud ja autopasunad lärmakad. Ent mis siis, kui üks või mitu teie meelt on võimendatud või moondunud? Ja kas on võimalik, et meil on ka müstiline kuues meel?

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Kui müüja toob pandimajja teise maailmasõja prototüübi kuju, ootab Chum kõrgemalt tehingule õnnistust. Rick võtab sihikule 19. sajandi noapüstoli. Chum tähistab pühi 1965. aasta originaalse "A Charlie Brown Christmas" soundtrack-albumiga.

programme.title: Oak Islandi needus
programme.desc: Nova Scotia ranniku lähedal paikneb väike saar, mis peidab endas mõistatuslikku saladust. 18. sajandil märgati seal öösiti kummalisi tulesid.

programme.title: William Shatneriga seletamatutes paikades
programme.desc: Loomariik on täis surmavaid kiskjaid ja mõned neist ründavad erakordsetel ja seletamatutel viisidel. Kuid kas mõned loomad ründavad inimesi ka muudel põhjustel kui tavaline kaitse ja nälg?

programme.title: Pandikunnid
programme.desc: Kui müüja toob poodi E.T. filmiplakati trükiproovi, helistab Chum oma eksperdile, et nõu küsida. Kas ta suudab sõlmida ebamaise tehingu? Seejärel viivad Rick ja Corey Ameerika kodusõja aegse vintpüssi lasketiiru.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tarek's picture-perfect wife, who Tarek's friends still can't believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, we'll follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life

Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: First Home Fix
programme.desc: Raisa and Austin renovate a 100-year-old home and reconfiguring it to meet the needs of its first-time homeowners will stretch their design limits.

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: Homeowners' plans for an addition has ended in a disaster of code violations, costly shortcuts and endless safety hazards. Mike, Sherry, and Michael step in, and after taking the house down to the studs, they're now ready to focus on finishes

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: After purchasing their bungalow, homeowners are left defeated and overwhelmed following a year of endless leaks and shocking electrical issues. Mike, Sherry, and Michael step in to help and must deal with insufficient waterproofing and dangerous wiring.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: Follow one family as they ditch the hustle and bustle and go on a journey to find the quintessential escape in Log Cabin Living . They'll navigate this unusual real estate market as they search for their perfect log home retreat. From access to everyday necessities, entertainment and recreational activities, to a whole new set of maintenance requirements, will they trade predictable living for a chance to live out their wildest dreams in a secluded log cabin?

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: A couple looks for a log cabin getaway in the mountains of Arizona. They're hoping to get their busy family of six to relax and enjoy riding ATVs in the small town of Payson, AZ. He would love a cabin with a rustic mountain feel while she's looking for a spacious setting where they can host family and friends. With the help of a local realtor, they hope to find the perfect retreat from the heat of the city.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: A family of four is looking to move from their current home in the city of Lynchburg, VA, to the nearby countryside where they will have more room to explore and become immersed in nature. He grew up visiting his grandmother in her log cabin and wants his children to have that experience as well. She's hoping to find a home with an updated kitchen and an open concept, and he's looking for a detached garage. It's a hefty wish list but their realtor is ready to help them find the perfect log home.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: Follow one family as they ditch the hustle and bustle and go on a journey to find the quintessential escape in Log Cabin Living . They'll navigate this unusual real estate market as they search for their perfect log home retreat. From access to everyday necessities, entertainment and recreational activities, to a whole new set of maintenance requirements, will they trade predictable living for a chance to live out their wildest dreams in a secluded log cabin?

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Families who achieved their dreams of buying an affordable vacation home are now tasked with the tough job of turning it into the relaxing oasis they envisioned when they purchased it. In each episode of Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation , watch as they work together to transform their new properties into a home away from home, proving that with a little imagination and a lot of muscle, you can have the relaxing getaway you've always wanted.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Families who achieved their dreams of buying an affordable vacation home are now tasked with the tough job of turning it into the relaxing oasis they envisioned when they purchased it. In each episode of Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation , watch as they work together to transform their new properties into a home away from home, proving that with a little imagination and a lot of muscle, you can have the relaxing getaway you've always wanted.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Designing duo Nate Berkus and Jeremiah Brent help moving families get a fresh start. They aid their clients in letting go of what they no longer need before renovating the property into the perfect dream home for the family's next stage of life.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Designing duo Nate Berkus and Jeremiah Brent help moving families get a fresh start. They aid their clients in letting go of what they no longer need before renovating the property into the perfect dream home for the family's next stage of life.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their property's full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tarek's picture-perfect wife, who Tarek's friends still can't believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, we'll follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Jalgpall: Bundesliiga. St. Pauli vs FC Koln
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the week's action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: Prantsusmaa jalgpalli kõrgliiga 1. liiga. Lens - Toulouse
programme.desc: PSG, AS Monaco, Marseille, Olympique Lyonnais & Lille... just to name a few. Ligue 1 is currently full of well-organised football teams and incredible European talent, who are a complement to the sport. As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: Jalgpall: Hispaania LaLiga. Real Betis - Real Madrid
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Jalgpall_ FA karikas. Manchester City vs Southampton
programme.desc: The FA Cup is the oldest knock-out tournament in England. Provided the Football Association, the competition provides raw emotion through "giant-killings" and 'underdog stories'. Premier League clubs enter in the third round of the tournament and with non-league teams starting the proceedings , n the early qualifying rounds, it promises to be another successful spectacle for viewers. In navigating to the latter stages of the knock-out rounds, teams all receive an amount of prize money that can be re-invested into training facilities and improvements to their respected grounds. With the final at Wembley, our exclusive coverage of this historic tournament will provide in-depth analysis and information. In keeping with the traditions of the trophy, Arsenal FC are the most successful (13).

As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: ATP Madrid Open 2026. Singles Round 2
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the exciting action from the Madrid Open, also known as the Mutua Madrid Open for sponsorship reasons, a professional tennis tournament for men and women held annualy in Spain.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Lahtised. Singles Round 2
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the exciting action from the Madrid Open, also known as the Mutua Madrid Open for sponsorship reasons, a professional tennis tournament for men and women held annualy in Spain.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Lahtised. Singles Round 2
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the exciting action from the Madrid Open, also known as the Mutua Madrid Open for sponsorship reasons, a professional tennis tournament for men and women held annualy in Spain.

programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the exciting action from the Madrid Open, also known as the Mutua Madrid Open for sponsorship reasons, a professional tennis tournament for men and women held annualy in Spain.

programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the exciting action from the Madrid Open, also known as the Mutua Madrid Open for sponsorship reasons, a professional tennis tournament for men and women held annualy in Spain.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Lahtised. Singles Round 2
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the exciting action from the Madrid Open, also known as the Mutua Madrid Open for sponsorship reasons, a professional tennis tournament for men and women held annualy in Spain.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Lahtised. Singles Round 2
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the exciting action from the Madrid Open, also known as the Mutua Madrid Open for sponsorship reasons, a professional tennis tournament for men and women held annualy in Spain.

programme.title: The Walker
programme.desc: Drama about an affable male escort who becomes embroiled in a murder plot. The escort enjoys a successful and glamorous career accompanying the wives of Washington's rich and famous to events their husbands couldn't attend. However, when a client involves him in a homicide cover-up, his life and career threaten to spiral out of control as he sees the darker side of political life in Washington.

programme.title: Dogworld
programme.desc: In the near future, Taranto is a ghost town surrounded by barbed wire that no one, not even the police, dares to enter. The poorest are left fighting for survival, while a gang is competing for territory with another gang. Two thirteen-year-old orphans, who grew up together, dream of joining one of the gangs.

programme.title: The Butler
programme.desc: The Butler (2013) is an American historical drama directed by Lee Daniels and starring Forest Whitaker and Oprah Winfrey. At the White House an elderly butler named Cecil Gaines is waiting for the newly inaugurated president Barack Obama. While waiting, the butler recounts his life story and all the former US presidents he served. A butler's job requires keeping what you heard to yourself and doing your job unnoticed. Serving eight presidents during his tenure, Cecil observed how American society was changing and even he has felt these changes.

programme.title: Waking Ned
programme.desc: The lucky winner of the national lottery is Ned Devine, so taken by his good fortune that he now can't be waked, because he died from the shock of it! News of the win spread quickly in the scenic little Irish village of Tully More, but not the secret news of Ned's demise. With lottery officials closing in to confirm the prize claimed by the deceased Devine, Ned's closest friends scheme to keep the prize money close to home, in memory of Ned of course! But as the plot twists humorously, they learn it is hard is to keep such a secret in a small town.

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: Monty Wildhorn, an alcoholic novelist of Westerns, has lost his drive. His nephew pushes him to summer in quiet Belle Isle. He begrudgingly befriends a newly single mom and her 3 girls who help him find the inspiration to write again.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Life on Tweedy's Chicken Farm is far from pleasant for the inmates; they are badly treated by Mr Tweedy and his domineering wife, and kept alive only as long as they keep producing eggs. Ginger the hen's various attempts at escape have failed due to the lethargy and downright incompetence of her fellow prisoners, but when Rocky - the famous Flying Rooster - crash lands in the farm, she sees the chance she has been waiting for: Rocky can teach everyone how to fly and they can stage a mass break-out. However, the braggartly Rocky is not all that he seems; can he really help Ginger and the others find freedom before Mrs Tweedy hatches her fowl plan to turn them all into chicken pies?

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express
programme.desc: Hercue Poirot is travelling aboard the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris. During the journey, Poirot is approached by American businessman Ratchett, who unsuccessfully tries to hire the detective to expose the source of the death threats being made against him. The next night the train is caught in heavy Balkan snow, and the following morning Ratchett is found stabbed to death. Railway executive Bianchi prevails upon Poirot to solve the case, and with the train fully booked, there are no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Hunting and Gathering
programme.desc: The film opens showing the day-to-day life of an elderly lady named Paulette. Paulette lives alone, dedicated to her animals, in particular her cats, and her garden. Her worst fear is of dying far from her home and garden. However, when she takes a fall she is sent to hospital who then advise that she recovers in a nursing-home, much to her dismay.

programme.title: Faultless
programme.desc: Jobless Constance returns to her home town and learns that there's a vacancy at the estate agency where she began her career. Her former boss finally ends up choosing a younger applicant. But Constance is ready to do anything to recover the job she sees as rightfully hers. Direction, screenplay: Sébastien Marnier (France, 2015)

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Mike Hodges' film is a gloriously kitsch update of the 1930s comic strip and film series, starring Sam J Jones as the American football star Flash Gordon, who's transported, along with the beautiful Dale Arden (Melody Anderson), by Dr Zarkov (Topol) into the realm of the most evil ruler in the universe, the Emperor Ming (Max von Sydow). Only by uniting those under Ming's merciless rule to join his revolution can Flash save Earth from destruction. The unashamedly over-the-top Queen soundtrack is matched by Danilo Donati's effervescent production design, and the film also stars Brian Blessed as the chief of the Hawkmen, Timothy Dalton as the leader of the Treemen, and Ornella Muti as Ming's daughter, whose lascivious designs on Flash are just one of the challenges he must overcome if he's to end Ming's tyranny.

programme.title: Maestro(s)
programme.desc: Follow the relationship between a father and a son who are both music conductors.

programme.title: Escobar: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Nick Brady and his girlfriend Maria, Pablo Escobar's niece, are making hurried plans to leave Colombia with Nick's brother, Dylan, when Escobar summons Nick to a meeting. He tells the gathered men, many of whom are his family, that he intends to surrender himself to the authorities and that they will have to take action in his absence to protect his fortune. Most of the men agree immediately. Nick is visibly hesitant but agrees when Pablo asks him directly for his help.

programme.title: The Wicker Man
programme.desc: Edward Woodward, Christopher Lee, Britt Ekland and Diane Cilento star in Robin Hardy's classic horror. Strait-laced police sergeant and devout Christian Neil Howie (Woodward) is sent to the remote Hebridean island of Summerisle to investigate the disappearance of a young girl called Rowan (Gerry Cowper). But his investigations and his morals are disturbed by the behaviour of the islanders, especially their free sexuality and their worship of the pagan gods. He meets the island's leader, Lord Summerisle (Lee), who explains how his Victorian grandfather developed fruit trees that thrived on the island and on which the islanders have come to depend. But with May Day approaching, Howie unearths what he thinks is a sinister connection between Rowan's disappearance and Lord Summerisle's orchards. And this places him in extreme peril. With Britt Ekland as Willow, the innkeeper's daughter; and Diane Cilento as the school teacher. Shown here in the "Final Cut" version of the movie. First play on Film4 (previously seen on Channel 4).

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: A man returns to his hometown of Naples, 40 years after abruptly leaving as a teen, stirring up a past which he's kept buried. He is determined to see his boyhood friend, now a leading Naples crime boss, with whom he shares a dark secret. Italian with English subtitles

programme.title: An Argentinian Crime
programme.desc: Rosario in the 80s. The disappearance of a man during the military dictatorship. Two young people from the court must do everything possible to solve the case while facing police corruption and various dangers that put their lives at risk.

programme.title: An Argentinian Crime
programme.desc: Rosario in the 80s. The disappearance of a man during the military dictatorship. Two young people from the court must do everything possible to solve the case while facing police corruption and various dangers that put their lives at risk.

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy starring Earl Cave (son of singer Nick) as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum, in Simon Bird's (The Inbetweeners) debut feature in the director's chair. Daniel (Cave) is all set for six weeks in Florida with his dad and his dad's pregnant wife, Bernie. The weather will be fantastic, and he'll get to drive his father's MG convertible. Meanwhile, his mum (Monica Dolan) won't let him drive the Vauxhall Astra and she never gets her own cake, but instead nicks bits of his. So, when Bernie calls to say that Daniel won't be able to come to Florida, Daniel is obviously not very happy. Can a Metallica-loving, black-clad teenager with Tippexed emblems on his shoes have any fun with a middle-aged librarian who wears comfortable sandals? Well, she is his mum... Also starring Tamsin Greig and Rob Brydon. Network Premiere.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism whose effects sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: The Face of Love
programme.desc: Several years after the death of her husband, a widow meets a stranger who greatly resembles her late husband, from his striking blue eyes to his kindness and humor, and falls in love with him, and, again, meets the love of her life.

programme.title: April And the Extraordinary World
programme.desc: April and the Extraordinary World is a 2015 French-Belgian-Canadian animated science fiction adventure film co-directed by Christian Desmares and Franck Ekinci. In 1870 on the eve of the Franco-Prussian War, French Emperor Napoleon III, accompanied by Marshal Bazaine, visits the lab of Gustave Franklin to access his project of breeding invulnerable supersoldiers. The emperor is disgusted with the results—two intelligent, talking komodo dragons ill-fit for war—and orders Bazaine to shoot them, but the creatures escape and the emperor instead causes an explosion that kills all three present. Napoleon III's successor then negotiates a settlement with Prussia to avert war, thus securing the throne to the House of Bonaparte.

programme.title: Rookie
programme.desc: This is a story of lost dreams and second chances that is steeped in engine oil and the adrenaline of motorcycle racing.

programme.title: The Duchess
programme.desc: 18th century England. Married at 17 to the rich and powerful Duke of Devonshire, Georgiana quickly charms high society with her stunning beauty, wit and love of life. However, behind this flamboyant image hides a woman who longs to be loved, a woman deserted by her husband - the only man in the kingdom indifferent to her charms - who prefers her best friend Elizabeth Foster, and who obliges her to accept a ménage à trois. Unhappy and unsatisfied, Georgiana leads a hectic social life. Her elegance, her extravagance and her taste for gambling create a sensation, particularly when she throws herself into politics alongside the Liberal Party. She's celebrated by princes and ministers. And she supports the young Member of Parliament, Charles Grey, with whom she falls passionately in love.

programme.title: Ladies
programme.desc: Lucie is in remission and her illness is almost a distant memory. Her family pushes her to live life to the fullest, and in doing so Lucie meets the charming and arrogant Clovis, who is immediately beguiled by her wit and humor. It is Dalila, however, an eccentric and delightful dance teacher, who inspires Lucie to rebuild her life and to grow into the woman she always wanted to be. For her mother, for her daughter, for Clovis.

programme.title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
programme.desc: Screen adaptation of Tracy Chevalier's best-selling novel, inspired by the Johannes Vermeer painting of the same name. Set in mid-17th-century Delft, Holland, 17-year-old Griet is forced into servanthood when her father suffers an accident and becomes unable to work. She is taken on at the Vermeer household, where her presence immediately provokes hostility from members of the family - particularly the artist's wife and eldest daughter - when she starts to forge an understanding with her mysterious master.

programme.title: Lost in Paris
programme.desc: ""Two on the Aisle"" - A salute to NY's Shubert Theater with Steve Lawrence & Eydie Gorme. --Steve & Eydie perform a medley of songs from ""Golden Rainbow,"" their current play at The Shubert Theater. They also perform selections from earlier Shubert plays.

programme.title: The Little Witch
programme.desc: The little witch is only 127-years-old, so just a youngster to the big witches. Despite being forbidden, she celebrates the Dance of the Witches on the Brocken Mountain on Walpurgis Night. As punishment, she has one year to learn the big book of spells by heart, and then her fate will be decided. Determined to be the best witch she can, she gets down to work, supported by her talking raven, Abraxas. At first reluctantly and then increasingly, she discovers helping people instead of annoying them with pranks makes her feel good. But the big witches, especially the scary weather witch Rumpumpel, are suspicious. For them, the last thing about being a really good witch is good deeds. And this puts the little witch in a terrible dilemma when it comes to her final test.

programme.title: Slumdog Millionaire
programme.desc: Danny Boyle's multi-Oscar-winning drama opens with Jamal Malik (Dev Patel), a call centre chaiwallah (tea seller), on the verge of winning 20 million rupees on the Indian version of Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?. But the show's host (Anil Kapoor) thinks Jamal's cheating and hands him to the police to beat the truth out of him. Jamal tells them he knows the answers because they relate to significant episodes in his life, which are then told in flashback. It's the tale of a seemingly inseparable friendship between Jamal, his brother Salim and their friend Latika, which is ultimately soured by Salim's actions. But Jamal's appearance on the TV quiz offers a chance of reconciliation, as well as great riches. Patel is outstanding in his role, with Jamal also being played at different stages of his life by Tanay Hemant Chheda and Ayush Mahesh Khedekar. Madhur Mittal, Ashutosh Lobo Gajiwala and Azharuddin Mohammed Ismail play Salim; with Frieda Pinto, Tanvi Ganesh Lonkar and Rubina Ali as Latika. In English, and Hindi with English subtitles. This screening of Slumdog Millionaire is in commemoration of Irrfan Khan who died April 29th aged just 53.

programme.title: Last Orders
programme.desc: On a cold winter day, Bear puts on his nightcap and decides to take a nice winter's nap. However, it would seem that others in the Big Blue House have other plans for Bear. Ojo comes to Bear in alarm --- concerned about the sudden disappearance of her duck friends from the Otter Pond. Bear makes her a cup of cocoa and tells her about migration. Treelo takes Bear outside, telling him there's feathers falling from the sky. Bear introduces him to the delights of snow. Bear finally settles down for the nap, but is woken up by Pip and Pop. They take him outside, where all the kids have a special surprise for him. Tutter's been trying to take a nap too, but with all the noise, he finds himself just as awake as Bear. In the Shadow segment, Shadow tries to help Bear get to sleep. She sings "Rockabye Baby." Songs In the Middle of Winter Notes In this episode, Ojo talks about her duck friends out at the Otter Pond. Duck characters were first seen on the program in the third season, with the introduction of Harry and his Mom in "Lost and Found."

programme.title: The Most Fun You Can Have Dying
programme.desc: The murder of Richard Speigel, chief financial officer for an exclusive, family-owned department store goes from the sitting room to the bedroom and into the board room as suspicion shifts from co-workers to family members.

programme.title: The Best Is Yet to Come
programme.desc: Following a monumental misunderstanding, two childhood friends (Fabrice Luchini and Patrick Bruel), each one persuaded that the other only has a few months left to live, decide to put it all aside to catch up on lost time and share their remaining days, with a little touch of joyful madness.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizona's animal community. On the road with AHS' field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Animal cruelty investigators and Emergency Animal Medical Technicians are on hand to do all they can to help the creatures. Meanwhile, back at the AHS' Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizona's animal community. On the road with AHS' field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Animal cruelty investigators and Emergency Animal Medical Technicians are on hand to do all they can to help the creatures. Meanwhile, back at the AHS' Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: Animal ER
programme.desc: Today the staff of Gulf Coast Veterinary Specialists, comes to the aid of the Houston Humane Society after they receive over 200 neglected animals that are confiscated during a pet store raid. Exotic animal specialist Danielle Inman and Dr. Sue Chen treat a wide variety of animals for issues related to neglect and mismanagement. Fortunately, almost all the animals make a full recovery and are placed into loving homes.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaska's bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwin's legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Bronx Zoo, one of the largest zoos in the USA and the largest city zoo the country has to offer. Opening their doors to camera crews, the daily operations of the world-famous animal sanctuary are revealed, as the staff keep their loving creatures healthy and happy. Renowned for its diverse collection of animals and wonderful exhibitions, the Bronx Zoo is one of the finest in the world, home to lions, bears, tigers, snow leopards, baboons, flamingos and many more extravagant species. This series showcases the effort, experience and expertise required to run the Bronx Zoo.

programme.title: Preposterous Pets
programme.desc: In this programme, we delve into the stories of eccentric individuals who have developed a special relationship with unusual, exotic animals, ranging from giant alligators and polar bears to deadly scorpions and wild capybaras. Join us as we set out on a journey across the globe to meet these extraordinary pets and their owners.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denver's Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeff's sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizona's animal community. On the road with AHS' field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Animal cruelty investigators and Emergency Animal Medical Technicians are on hand to do all they can to help the creatures. Meanwhile, back at the AHS' Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizona's animal community. On the road with AHS' field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Animal cruelty investigators and Emergency Animal Medical Technicians are on hand to do all they can to help the creatures. Meanwhile, back at the AHS' Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Reality series, set in Texas and similar to ''North Woods Law'', that follows daily lives of men and women who are Game Wardens and whose job is to protect deserts, lakes, woods, bayous, coasts and wild animals that live in the second-largest state in the U.S. These people have their plates full as they must deal with poachers, hunters who don't obey the law, smugglers, while they rescue injured wildlife and defend citizens.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: The Vet Life is an amazing series revolving around three friends, three vets, Diarra Blue, Aubrey Ross, and Mike Lavigne and their everyday lives. These guys became friends back in University, then they worked in Las Vegas and finally moved to Texas and opened a full-service veterinary hospital of their own. The series highlights their daily routine, their duties at work and at home, their families and pets.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Treehouse Masters is an American reality television series hosted by Pete Nelson, a treehouse builder. Pete and his team design and build all types of treehouses for clients across the country. The clients and Pete's team are the people who never stop dreaming. You'll be surprised to know how many people want to get away from the noisy comfortable cities and live in close communion with mother nature. So getting a treehouse is their chance to live a dream. Every episode will amaze you because of Pete's talent and incredible imagination. He can build any type of a treehouse, starting from a small simple ones to most complex residences with all modern communication. Every wish of a customer will be heard and fulfilled.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Pit bulls are eager to please, faithful and enthusiastic friends and pleasant with children according to credible canine organizations. But they have fallen from grace. Now often associated with gang members, dog fighting and attacks. That's about to change. Animal Planet introduces you to this dog's greatest ally, and she's not a man - she's a fiery red-headed leading lady, and she's determined to end the needless hostility toward pit bulls. Meet Tia Maria Torres - 49-year-old mother, top pit bull trainer and founder and owner of Villalobos Rescue Center - the country's largest rescue facility for pit bulls.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwin's legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denver's Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeff's sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Insane Pools Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End is a home improvement show that follows pool designer Lucas Congdon and his team from Lucas Lagoons. Congdon and his crew renovate existing pools and build new ones on residential properties. Thanks to their unbelievable imagination, creativity and professionalism they can turn every pool into an ultimate backyard oasis for a whole family and transform it into a natural lagoon. They prefer working with hand-selected stones from Tennessee.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The Last Alaskans chronicles the daily rituals of four families choosing to live in seclusion, vast distances from each other as they overcome harsh arctic conditions, frustrating setbacks, and aggressive wildlife while they survive in one of the last great unspoiled and unforgiving wildernesses on the planet. In the refuge, prop planes, canoes and dog sleds replace the modern luxuries that most people take for granted. Humans cohabit with the animal world and often share the same emotions and struggles while they discover that they are not necessary at the top of the food chain. Utilizing an authentic and organic approach to document the weeks leading up to and during the winter season, The Last Alaskans sets a distinctive and vibrant tone unlike any other docu-series before to completely immerse the viewer into a world that would otherwise be lost in history.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaska's bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Reality series, set in Texas and similar to ''North Woods Law'', that follows daily lives of men and women who are Game Wardens and whose job is to protect deserts, lakes, woods, bayous, coasts and wild animals that live in the second-largest state in the U.S. These people have their plates full as they must deal with poachers, hunters who don't obey the law, smugglers, while they rescue injured wildlife and defend citizens.

programme.title: I'm Alive
programme.desc: I'M ALIVE features the death-defying and moving stories of people who — regardless of the obstacles or consequences — were determined to survive an animal attack. Driven by thoughts of loved ones and the desire to live, these individuals found the strength to survive terrifying and unexpected encounters by some of nature's most dangerous creatures. This inspirational drama combines victim interviews with true-to-life reenactments, giving a replay of the split-second decisions that saved lives. Over the course of 10 episodes, I'M ALIVE immerses viewers in the psychological experience of those involved, focusing on what pulled them through and what left them powerfully changed. Every survivor had something to live for, and in that fleeting moment of chaos, their desire for life outshone the attack.

programme.title: Deadly Islands
programme.desc: Renowned zoologist, animal trainer, and television presenter Dave Salmoni is no stranger to adventure. Having trekked the globe to study creatures and their unique ecosystems, Dave has walked the line between the wild and human world to explore the delicate balance between wildlife and civilization. From the people behind the stunning natural history series, PLANET EARTH and NORTH AMERICA, DEADLY ISLANDS sees Dave's skills tested to the limits as he lives alongside some of Mother Nature's fiercest predators. Dave visits some of the world's most remote islands to investigate how and why their native inhabitants have been so spectacularly successful at surviving - despite the harshest of conditions. In a unique approach that blends all the splendour of a natural history documentary series with an incredible investigative twist, audiences follow Dave as detective while he sets out to crack some of the last big secrets surrounding some of the world's most successful natural-born killers. Only by venturing closer than most would dare to some of the planet's most dangerous animals-from the great hammerhead shark to the grizzly bear. Can Dave uncover their secrets. How have they come to thrive so spectacularly in these remote places, often in confined island settings? Dave's skills will be tested to the limits as he lives alongside some of Mother Nature's fiercest predators, on some of the world's most remote islands,all to solve the DEADLY ISLANDS.

programme.title: Swarm Chasers
programme.desc: Some of the most terrifying and awe-inspiring events in the natural world surprisingly do not involve animals with jaws and claws. 'Swarmchasers' explores a phenomenon that can turn even the most innocuous creatures into killers - the instinct to swarm. In this action-packed series, hosts Steve and Greg head into the eye of the greatest animal plagues on the planet to experience their devastating power and discover what it takes to transform organisms into ferocious and deadly mobs. First up, Steve and Greg leading scientists and tacticians in the military-style war on locusts, head to the blow-torch heat of the Australian outback, swarm-chasing a well-known pest that has terrorised humanity since the dawn of civilisation. Next, Rodent expert Dr Steven Belmain is on an expedition to the dangerous region of Bangladesh to try to unravel a bizarre mystery that has plagued locals for generations- a swarm of black rats.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizona's animal community. On the road with AHS' field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Animal cruelty investigators and Emergency Animal Medical Technicians are on hand to do all they can to help the creatures. Meanwhile, back at the AHS' Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizona's animal community. On the road with AHS' field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Meanwhile, back at the AHS' Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The Last Alaskans chronicles the daily rituals of four families choosing to live in seclusion, vast distances from each other as they overcome harsh arctic conditions, frustrating setbacks, and aggressive wildlife while they survive in one of the last great unspoiled and unforgiving wildernesses on the planet. In the refuge, prop planes, canoes and dog sleds replace the modern luxuries that most people take for granted. Humans cohabit with the animal world and often share the same emotions and struggles while they discover that they are not necessary at the top of the food chain. Utilizing an authentic and organic approach to document the weeks leading up to and during the winter season, The Last Alaskans sets a distinctive and vibrant tone unlike any other docu-series before to completely immerse the viewer into a world that would otherwise be lost in history.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaska's bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Pit bulls are eager to please, faithful and enthusiastic friends and pleasant with children according to credible canine organizations. But they have fallen from grace. Now often associated with gang members, dog fighting and attacks. That's about to change. Animal Planet introduces you to this dog's greatest ally, and she's not a man - she's a fiery red-headed leading lady, and she's determined to end the needless hostility toward pit bulls. Meet Tia Maria Torres - 49-year-old mother, top pit bull trainer and founder and owner of Villalobos Rescue Center - the country's largest rescue facility for pit bulls.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: The Vet Life is an amazing series revolving around three friends, three vets, Diarra Blue, Aubrey Ross, and Mike Lavigne and their everyday lives. These guys became friends back in University, then they worked in Las Vegas and finally moved to Texas and opened a full-service veterinary hospital of their own. The series highlights their daily routine, their duties at work and at home, their families and pets.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denver's Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeff's sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwin's legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
programme.desc: Join biologist and angling expert Jeremy Wade as he travels the world peering through our darkest, murky waters, investigating tales of mythical monsters, mutated beasts and depleting fish populations. The star of River Monsters is back to explain the unexplainable, as he investigates these reported sightings of unknown creatures. Whether it's Lake Garda's reptilian monster, a species of pike the size of a man, a river monster deemed extinct in the Outback or South Africa's fabled half-man, half-fish monster, Jeremy will need to use all of his experience if he is to catch, or even glimpse, these creatures.

programme.title: Insane Pools Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End is a home improvement show that follows pool designer Lucas Congdon and his team from Lucas Lagoons. Congdon and his crew renovate existing pools and build new ones on residential properties. Thanks to their unbelievable imagination, creativity and professionalism they can turn every pool into an ultimate backyard oasis for a whole family and transform it into a natural lagoon. They prefer working with hand-selected stones from Tennessee.

programme.title: Insane Pools Off the Deep End

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How Do Animals Do That is a documentary series where experts answer various questions about the animal kingdom, revealing some amazing fun facts along the way. Animals have super powers humans can only dream of, they can do incredible things. The series provides answers to the questions how they do it and why. Find out why moths are attracted to flames, why turtles cry, why sea otters bond with stones, and why dogs wag their tails.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Bronx Zoo, one of the largest zoos in the USA and the largest city zoo the country has to offer. Opening their doors to camera crews, the daily operations of the world-famous animal sanctuary are revealed, as the staff keep their loving creatures healthy and happy. Renowned for its diverse collection of animals and wonderful exhibitions, the Bronx Zoo is one of the finest in the world, home to lions, bears, tigers, snow leopards, baboons, flamingos and many more extravagant species. This series showcases the effort, experience and expertise required to run the Bronx Zoo.

programme.title: Tanked

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Expedition Bigfoot is a documentary series exploring the possible existence of the fabled apelike creature. A primatologist, a survivalist, an author and a Bigfoot investigator team up, and set out into the Oregon forests to search for the hairy creature. With the help of advanced technology, like drones, algorithms and trail cameras, they try to find out if the old myth could be true. The series also includes interviews with eyewitnesses, as every year hundreds of people claim to have seen it.

programme.title: Sharks Among Us
programme.desc: Shark encounters are increasing, but the solutions to prevent them prove deadly to sharks. Can Dr. Craig O'Connell prove that sharks and people can peacefully coexist? S/1/1

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: This reality TV show follows Marty Raney and his two children, Matt Raney and Misty Bilodeau, who are successful homesteaders from the state of Alaska and have the skills needed to fish, hunt, raise livestock, and otherwise survive in an untamed landscape. Struggling homesteaders across the country call these experts to help them save their homesteads and become self-sufficient while they teach them the necessary skills to survive the wilderness.

programme.title: Meet the Sloths
programme.desc: Meet the Sloths is a fascinating documentary series presenting real stories of an extraordinary sanctuary for injured, orphaned and abandoned sloths, most of which cannot be returned to the wild due to disability or lack of survival skills. It is located in Costa Rica and is run by Judy Avey-Arroyo. The series presents the real stories of five main sloth characters including Toby, a newcomer to the sanctuary who was rejected by his mum. Twins, Violet and Sebastian, are just three-months old and struggling for survival. Randy has got a broken arm after getting in a brawl with another male and falling from a tree. And Buttercup who was the first to arrive on Judy's doorstep 20 years ago.

programme.title: Meet the Sloths
programme.desc: Meet the Sloths is a fascinating documentary series presenting real stories of an extraordinary sanctuary for injured, orphaned and abandoned sloths, most of which cannot be returned to the wild due to disability or lack of survival skills. programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Maneet's Eats
programme.desc: Maneet Chauhan makes crispy spinach and onion pakoras and saag paneer, a satisfying vegetarian meal made from curdled paneer cheese and bright greens.

programme.title: Maneet's Eats
programme.desc: Chef Maneet Chauhan makes a masala omelet sandwich, with traditional Indian spices and Amul cheese, and stuffed parathas.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Tina Fey joins Ina Garten at the barn for a fun-filled day of deep conversation, breakfast custard, and a dream dinner of chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Actor Christine Baranski visits Ina's barn to share Broadway stories and a culinary trip to Italy. They cook Bolognese and roasted broccolini.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson has the bakers use nail art patterns as inspiration for geometric tarts. Then, they model their edible Easter hats on the bunny-walk!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.
