programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Buried in debt, Habanera and the Guero in Houston, Texas, is on the verge of closing. The infighting is destroying the business and a 3-year-old daughter is stuck in the middle. Robert Irvine will have to convince the owner, Ben, to step back from the obsessive control of his partner and chef, Vanessa, and concentrate on the rest of the restaurant, or Ben will lose both his business and his family.

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: In the final challenge, the sibling teams must create delicious and stunning animated illusion cakes to win the grand prize of $25,000.

programme.title: Baker's Dozen
programme.desc: Contestants decorate beautiful miniature wedding cakes with the top five advancing. They then must impress the judges by baking their specialty. Only three finalists get to wow guest judge Loria Stern with a dessert inspired by nature!

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: In the final challenge, the sibling teams must create delicious and stunning animated illusion cakes to win the grand prize of $25,000.

programme.title: Baker's Dozen
programme.desc: Contestants decorate beautiful miniature wedding cakes with the top five advancing. They then must impress the judges by baking their specialty. Only three finalists get to wow guest judge Loria Stern with a dessert inspired by nature!

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: Hosts and judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini welcome 10 talented chefs to Ciao House, where they will live together in a beautiful Tuscan villa and be tested like never before on their proficiency with Italian cuisine. Two chefs receive a huge advantage going into the next round, and one chef must say "Ciao Ciao" to the villa.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Chopped

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Buried in debt, Habanera and the Guero in Houston, Texas, is on the verge of closing. The infighting is destroying the business and a 3-year-old daughter is stuck in the middle. Robert Irvine will have to convince the owner, Ben, to step back from the obsessive control of his partner and chef, Vanessa, and concentrate on the rest of the restaurant, or Ben will lose both his business and his family.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Brave and talented chefs attempt to take down Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli, the most feared and accomplished competition cook in America. Chef Alex goes up against three chefs in two rounds of cooking, and anyone -- even Alex -- can be sent home after a blind tasting by the judges. Each chef hails from a different state, but they all share the same culinary specialty and drive to beat Alex for ultimate bragging rights and $15,000.

programme.title: Save the Leftovers
programme.desc: A Tale Of Two Fridges. Food truck owner Omayra Dakis and chef Dominque Crisp turn leftovers into tacos and ramen. Then, they make dishes for Antonia Lofaso and Jake Smollett.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship
programme.desc: Four cupcake connoisseurs battle it out in this cooking competition series, hoping to prove they are the supreme cupcake bakers and take home the $10,000 prize. Each of these contestants are undoubtedly talented cupcake designers, but there can only be one winner, and the heat is on to showcase their artistry and flair when it comes to baking these little sweet treats. Hosted by Kardea Brown, the show give the bakers new challenges to complete in each episode, with the poorest performing contestant eliminated at each stage of the competition, resulting in a final showdown between the very best.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood City Bakes is hosted by the British most loved baker, Paul Hollywood, who explores 10 cities around the globe. He is looking for the family bakeries, corner delis and luxury hotels which have created the baking heritage of entire cities. From Cape Town to Reykjavik, Paul will personally guide into the tastiest baking to be found there, each cities own culture and unique history. Exploring the sights of each city Paul gets inspired and creates two unique recipes of his own.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as they're pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and who'll be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Ghost Brothers
programme.desc: What you see is what you get with Dalen Spratt, Juwan Mass and Marcus Harvey, the Southeast's newest and most dynamic paranormal investigation team. These three best friends lead Destination America's new series GHOST BROTHERS, on a mission to uncover whether some unique, legendary "haunted" houses are the real deal. Raised in religious households, Dalen, Juwan and Marcus were taught that "messing" with the dead is dangerous business, but some unexplained experiences of their own piqued their intense fascination, ultimately driving them to find out firsthand just how spooky the supernatural can be. Blending natural curiosity with comedic flair, these charismatic characters offer a fresh, funny and unique take on the spirit world.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places
programme.desc: Join our crew as they take us on a journey to investigate some of the scariest and most spine-chilling places on the planet. We visit horrifying haunts and encounter mysterious creatures that are not of this world. Not for the faint-hearted, each hour-long episode of this series explores such ghoulish phenomena as the malevolent spirits that stalk an abandoned amusement park; the realm of the undead who inhabit a derelict theatre that is used as a morgue; the spirits of long-dead seamen who still walk the decks of a decommisioned warship; and an island that is still in thrall to the presence of an infamous pirate.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: This paranormal reality series follows explorer and ghost hunter Dakota Laden who partners up his sister Chelsea and best friend Tanner, to travel across the country in an RV and visit the most haunted locations in America -dark corridors of Brushy Mountain State Penitentiary, notorious Eloise Psychiatric Hospital, terrifying St. Albans Sanatorium and many more, as they learn the blood-chilling stories behind this scary places and face their darkest fears.

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.desc: Hoping to reconnect with his troubled daughter, a widowed father unsuspectingly brings home a dollhouse that contains a terrible secret, one that will threaten his very sanity and the lives of his children.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: Find out the breathtaking stories hidden behind the doors of the most famous, notorious and impressive castles and mansions in different parts of the world. Listen to their dark secrets and mysterious legends, and visit Frankenstein Castle in Darmstadt, Germany, the Tower of London in London, England, Castello di Malaspina in Fosdinovo, Italy, Edinburgh Castle in Edinburgh, Scotland, Bran Castle in Bran, Romania and other magic spots.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban sets out to bring the truth about sea monsters to the surface. After exposing a US Navy encounter with an unclassified creature in a Caribbean trench, Paul tracks a similar one said to be hiding in the dark depths of Vermont's Lake Champlain.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates evil shapeshifters from Navajo folklore known as skinwalkers. Paul tracks the mythical beasts from the heart of Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch in Utah to Wisconsin, where he captures something unexplainable.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: SaraJane and her four daughters from Southern California pool their savings and head to Alaska in an attempt to reopen their deceased Grandfather's gold mines, one in Nome and another 500 miles away in Fairbanks. Working side by side with grizzled Alaskan mining crews, SJ and her daughters face everything Alaska has to offer, and then some. In a race against the season-ending winter, the women push to secure a return on their investment, as well as a renewal of their family legacy.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: SaraJane and her four daughters from Southern California pool their savings and head to Alaska in an attempt to reopen their deceased Grandfather's gold mines, one in Nome and another 500 miles away in Fairbanks. Working side by side with grizzled Alaskan mining crews, SJ and her daughters face everything Alaska has to offer, and then some. In a race against the season-ending winter, the women push to secure a return on their investment, as well as a renewal of their family legacy.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: Within the Last Frontier lies a region known as the Alaska Triangle, spanning 200,000 unforgiving square miles where more people go missing per capita than anywhere else on earth. Treacherous terrain and unforgiving natural elements have stopped many in their tracks, but some Alaskans hold onto the idea that mysterious monsters snatched them up. Unidentified crypto-creatures wander the state covered by millions of acres of dense wilderness and are known to lift and reposition trees with ease, create seismic activity with their minds, and even decapitate humans with one bite. Destination America's new series ALASKA MONSTERS travels with a team of native outdoorsmen, who call themselves the Midnight Sons, as they investigate the harsh Alaskan forest in a quest to uncover proof of frightening monsters thought to be living there.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: Find out the breathtaking stories hidden behind the doors of the most famous, notorious and impressive castles and mansions in different parts of the world. Listen to their dark secrets and mysterious legends, and visit Frankenstein Castle in Darmstadt, Germany, the Tower of London in London, England, Castello di Malaspina in Fosdinovo, Italy, Edinburgh Castle in Edinburgh, Scotland, Bran Castle in Bran, Romania and other magic spots.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Unmasking an aspect of dining out that will make you think twice before ordering off the menu, and utilizing his knowledge of all things edible, Andrew Zimmern is on a quest to find the world's most bizarre foods. Andrew knows that one man's poison is another's delicacy but he isn't afraid to poke a little fun at the local fare or himself. Our energetic food-a-holic infiltrates markets and restaurants taking viewers behind the scenes to savor the local cuisine - even if that means chewing on eggs with legs, gulping down a beating frog heart or polishing off a lamb's eyeball. Andrew is game for anything and knows the most interesting food is found closest to the source. So whether he's chasing down large water rodents in the Louisiana bayou, fishing for piranha in the Amazon or flushing out cave bats in Malaysia, you can be sure the guy with the iron stomach will dish up the unimaginable.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Thrilling American paranormal docu-reality series that follows investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry who visit various haunted homes across the country in order to help people who are tormented by the spirits of their late relatives. These families are scared by the mysterious occurences and they will seek help from this amazing ghost-hunting duo. Amy and Adam will try to find evidence of paranormal presence, contact the spirits and provide closure for the featured family.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies
programme.desc: Codes and Conspiracies series uncovers the mind-blowing truth and secret history hidden behind the world's most iconic institutions, secret societies, notorious locations, and mysterious symbols. Find out a dark side of America, presented by shadowy organizations and underground places. There are plenty of spots still remaining secret and puzzles still not done all over the country. The series explores them and presents the uncovered and deciphered of a mysterious real world. Did President Roosevelt know about Pearl Harbor? What are the dirty secrets of slot machines in Las Vegas? What are the blackest secrets of Alcatraz?

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown With Nick Groff
programme.desc: Paranormal Lockdown brings together Nick Groff from Ghost Adventures and Katrina Weidmann from Paranormal State as they spend 72 hours completely locked down in some of the most haunted places in America. Believing that by spending time isolated within a haunted location for a longer period of time than most paranormal shows will bring them closer to communication with the spirits that may be haunting these locations.

programme.title: Ghost Loop
programme.desc: Follow a team of highly specialized paranormal experts, who help both the living and the dead and focus on a distinct type of haunting - ''ghost loop'', which happens when paranormal entities terrorize the living through endless and repetitive supernatural cycles, manifesting again and again in the same location. In each episode, paranormal investigator and medium Sean Austin, empath Kris Star, researcher and tech advisor Chris Califf, design specialist Eric Vitale, and tech support Matt Lytle, examine and research their client's property and history. Then, they formulate a plan they believe will help stop the haunting - whether it's building a 1900s-era train compartment, replicating a tavern from the 1850s, or constructing a 19th century baby's nursery. The team uses emotionally charged settings to draw out the entities in hopes that it will release the energy and break the loop once and for all.

programme.title: Haunting In The Heartland
programme.desc: Something evil lurks in the shadows of the close-knit communities, idyllic Main Streets and rolling fields of America's heartland. Paranormal investigator Steve Shippy witnessed this darkness firsthand as a child growing up in rural Michigan. Now, with the help of local eyewitnesses and historical records, he's made it his mission to solve these mysterious hauntings and bring resolution to the living and the dead.

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.desc: After receiving a cursed television from Charles Manson, a criminology student slowly loses his grip on reality. Can he resist the dark pull of the TV, or will he succumb and become the latest "family member" to kill in the infamous cult leader's name?

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Paranormal documentary and reality TV series follows investigations of scary locations reported to be haunted by ghost hunters Zak Bagans, Nick Groff, and Aaron Goodwin. Many places with shady past like hotels, casinos, homes, abandoned buildings are full of aggressive paranormal activities and do not let people live peacefully. Each episode begins with the crew touring the investigation site with its owners and interviewing the witnesses. Then the ghost hunters crew set up static night-vision cameras to film what's happening. They use a lot of up-to-date equipment to get any sort of evidence and then based on what they manage to get, they start analyzing and investigating things in order to get to the core of each case.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits

Amy and Adam will try to find evidence of paranormal presence, contact the spirits and provide closure for the featured family.

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores extraordinary stories in this riveting documentary series, delving into myths, legends, and local tales to reveal the truth behind a number of perplexing tales. His adventures take him all across the American landscape as he attempts to get to the bottom of some of history's most intriguing stories, examining astonishing and implausible events. Each episode focusses on a variety of inextricable events, using interviews, archive footage, and dramatised re-enactments to portray the implausible. Let Don take you Beyond the Unknown; a world of bizarre occurrences, peculiarities, sinister evils, and unsolved happenings.

programme.title: Ghost Brothers
programme.desc: What you see is what you get with Dalen Spratt, Juwan Mass and Marcus Harvey, the Southeast's newest and most dynamic paranormal investigation team. These three best friends lead Destination America's new series GHOST BROTHERS, on a mission to uncover whether some unique, legendary "haunted" houses are the real deal. Raised in religious households, Dalen, Juwan and Marcus were taught that "messing" with the dead is dangerous business, but some unexplained experiences of their own piqued their intense fascination, ultimately driving them to find out firsthand just how spooky the supernatural can be. Blending natural curiosity with comedic flair, these charismatic characters offer a fresh, funny and unique take on the spirit world.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Documentary series in which host Don Wildman, history enthusiast and adventurer, focuses on interesting and unusual artifacts held in museums, historical institutions, and unexplored archives around the world. Don discovers extraordinary, obscure relics and artifacts, shares their incredible stories, that have either been forgotten or are lesser known, and reveals their secrets, taking the viewers on a spectacular tour through history. We also get to find out why and how some of these unusual objects ended up in the museums.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: Mummies Unwrapped follows passionate Egyptologist, Ramy Romany, as he investigates tombs, graves and burial sites, shedding a light on these mummified individuals. Famous for his love of Egyptian history, Ramy Romany has featured in over 100 documentaries on the ancient civilisation, and in this series uncovers myths, legends and stories about each mummy, whilst attempting to identify their history and origin. This fascinating documentary unearths new theories and evidence that could rewrite history forever.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: Thrilling documentary series that follows Chuck Zukowski, a former Colorado law enforcement officer, who has been researching and investigating UFO-related incidents for over 30 years, his son Daniel Zukowski and investigator Heather Taddy, as they search for proof of alien life, investigate reports of UFO-related incidents across America, trying to find evidence that others have missed, while listening to some of the witnesses that were afraid to come forward until now. The team will have many adventures- they will search for the infamous Skinwalker, go on a treasure hunt of a lifetime when they receive a mysterious map, attempt to find an alien that reportedly escaped from Area 51, investigate energy vortexes, and have many other paranormal and UFO-related activities.

programme.title: Alien Highway

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban sets out to bring the truth about sea monsters to the surface. After exposing a US Navy encounter with an unclassified creature in a Caribbean trench, Paul tracks a similar one said to be hiding in the dark depths of Vermont's Lake Champlain.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates evil shapeshifters from Navajo folklore known as skinwalkers. Paul tracks the mythical beasts from the heart of Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch in Utah to Wisconsin, where he captures something unexplainable.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: What do we really know about life beyond the realm of our planet? Disturbing discoveries about the rest of our universe have perplexed scientists, and the rest of the world, for as long as we can remember. Now, the files and discoveries of one of the worlds biggest independent agencies have been dug up, for thorough investigation. Each episode scrutinises questionable evidence, encounters and sightings, to shed some light on the unexplained files of NASA. Featuring testimonies of NASA insiders and scientists who have first hand experience of the enigmas, laying within our universe.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: What do we really know about life beyond the realm of our planet? Disturbing discoveries about the rest of our universe have perplexed scientists, and the rest of the world, for as long as we can remember. Now, the files and discoveries of one of the worlds biggest independent agencies have been dug up, for thorough investigation. Each episode scrutinises questionable evidence, encounters and sightings, to shed some light on the unexplained files of NASA. Featuring testimonies of NASA insiders and scientists who have first hand experience of the enigmas, laying within our universe.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: Considered one of NASA's original space pioneers, astronaut Gordon Cooper discovered something extraordinary on a 1963 mission. While circling Earth during a 122-hour flight to detect nuclear sites, Cooper photographed more than 100 anomalies around the South Caribbean. He later believed the dark patches that appeared on the photos to be sunken ships, and while working for decades in secret, Gordon created a map that he thought could uncover treasures worth billions of dollars. Before passing away, he shared his meticulous research with longtime friend Darrell Miklos, and now Miklos is teaming with seasoned explorers and researchers to finally make good on Gordon's dream.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Morgan City
programme.desc: After a Louisiana city struggles to deal with the sheer volume of emergency calls relating to encounters with creepy ghosts, Police Chief James Blair hires a team of paranormal experts to ascertain the truth behind these ghoulish happenings. Morgan City's residents have been left feeling terrified and tense after reports that ghosts from the city's past have started to haunt the bayou area. Comprised of Louisiana local Jereme Leonard, psychic medium Sarah Lemos, former FBI agent Ben Hansen, and local historian Diane Wiltz, the team delves into the truth behind the ghostly events. Reality-documentary series.

programme.title: The Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: Investigator Tim Wood uncovers a bone-chilling link between Gunslinger Gulch and a former brothel in Butte, Montana. Back at the ranch, the team grows more concerned for the Broussards after an experiment reveals a dark force's psychological warfare.

programme.title: The Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When a Seattle family moves to a ghost town in Montana, they quickly realize they are not alone. Fearful that paranormal activity will derail plans to operate a guest ranch, they call in Tim Wood and Sapphire Sandalo to uncover the source of the haunting.

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.desc: Follow the frightening and hellish tales behind the spooky relics on display in Zak Bagans' Las Vegas museum, by way of scripted shorts produced by Roth and his accredited team, and with featured commentary from Bagans himself.

programme.title: The Holzer Files
programme.desc: Based on the real life files of America's first ghost hunter, Dr. Hans Holzer (whose most famous case concerned the Lutz family of Amityville, NY), this show follows a team of paranormal investigators as they reexamine the terrifying tales that mystified the doctor. The team consists of paranormal investigator Dave Schrader, psychic medium Cindy Kaza and equipment technician Shane Pittman and they are aided by Holzer's daughter, Alexandra. They examine thousands of documents, letters, photographs, and audio and visual recordings, sometimes going as far back as the 50s. Following on from where Holzer left off, the team bring the investigations up to the present day and visit the locations of the supernatural events such as the Peck House, the Morris-Jumel Mansion, the Whaley House, and the USS Constellation.

programme.title: The Holzer Files
programme.desc: Based on the real life files of America's first ghost hunter, Dr. Hans Holzer (whose most famous case concerned the Lutz family of Amityville, NY), this show follows a team of paranormal investigators as they reexamine the terrifying tales that mystified the doctor. programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: As a hurricane hits Houston, a mother disappears. With resources strained and leads thin, authorities call in Texas Ranger Jim Holland for help.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery and People magazine partner to re-examine some of the most high profile crime cases in recent history. The one-hour series brings viewers tales of betrayal, buried secrets and unsung heroes, ripped from the pages of one of the nation's top weekly magazines. These stories transcended news and became part of pop culture, revealing shocking twists, new evidence, and unexpected resolutions. Interlaced within every episode are exclusive interviews with People's journalists, archival footage, re-creations, and firsthand accounts by those closest to the investigations.

programme.title: Six Degrees Of Murder
programme.desc: An intriguing murder documentary that investigates murder cases that require law enforcement as they unravel the complex maize of relationships in attempts to uncover the truth. Follow these true crime cases as the investigators work through mysterious murders that have complicated stories. The theme of the series is that each episode the perpetrator and victim are connected by a maximum of six factors. Tracking down the truth within a web of confusion is worked through in investigative teams to reach a conclusion.

programme.title: Extreme Forensics
programme.desc: Often, some of the most bizarre and baffling criminal mysteries can only be solved using the expertise, skill and diligence of the members of the forensics department. This show reveals new and never-before-seen techniques which the teams use to solve the most puzzling of crimes. We follow cases such as when two construction workers are found dead after eight shots are heard in a New Jersy motel room, there are no witnesses and no obvious motive and only one piece of evidence holds the key; or when a fifteen-year-old girl is savagely beaten and killed in an Ohio cemetery and forensic professionals have to come up with a DNA sample when none exists; or when a 55-year-old man disapperas from a quiet Mississippi River town only for his skull to be discovered months later and hundreds of miles away buried in concrete at a truck stop.

programme.title: Extreme Forensics
programme.desc: Often, some of the most bizarre and baffling criminal mysteries can only be solved using the expertise, skill and diligence of the members of the forensics department. programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: CHAOS IN COURT examines clips of dramatic, unexpected, and cathartic courtroom moments. Each episode brings the backstories of the crimes and legal proceedings to the forefront with insightful analysis from a diverse panel of experts including judges, defense attorneys, prosecutors, and criminal psychologists. Featured within each episode are interviews with defendants, family members, and others who witnessed the action to help bring dramatic courtroom moments to life, and the emotional realities of what happens when the ultimate stakes are on trial.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: CHAOS IN COURT examines clips of dramatic, unexpected, and cathartic courtroom moments. Each episode brings the backstories of the crimes and legal proceedings to the forefront with insightful analysis from a diverse panel of experts including judges, defense attorneys, prosecutors, and criminal psychologists. Featured within each episode are interviews with defendants, family members, and others who witnessed the action to help bring dramatic courtroom moments to life, and the emotional realities of what happens when the ultimate stakes are on trial.

programme.title: Shattered
programme.desc: Documentary series that looks at the impact a single crime can have on multiple lives. The show unearths past homicide cases that are still causing distress among the involved families today. Whether it's witnesses, families of the victims, or law enforcement officers, each episode provides a unique perspective on the committed crime, with the three tales slowly intertwining into one. Shattered explores the ripple effect that flows through entire communities after such harrowing crimes and, with the help of re-enactments and these personal accounts, shows the eternal pain that will burden these families forever.

The theme of the series is that each episode the perpetrator and victim are connected by a maximum of six factors. Tracking down the truth within a web of confusion is worked through in investigative teams to reach a conclusion.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: A mysterious body is discovered in the woods near a mobile home park in Port New Richey, Florida. After some process of elimination and discovery of evidence, the body is identified as Judy Therianos. Investigators at Pasco County Sheriff's Office make a break in the case after uncovering surveillance footage from a liquor store, where Therianos and an unknown male are seen together. This unknown male quickly becomes the prime suspect, but as the detectives continue their investigation, three people come forward and disclose information that leads to an arrest.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: Retired Pasco County Pastor and avid coin collector, Billy Shuler, was reported missing by his wife after he went out one morning to meet with a prospective client and never returned home. A search is immediately ordered, and detectives find Schuler's abandoned van in an industrial parking lot, wherein the van's GPS system leads to the body. But even though progress was being made, the case went cold. After a year, police find an unlikely connection between several bank robberies and Shuler's murder, leading to the final conclusion of the case.

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body
programme.desc: Las Vegas Detectives find themselves on the hunt of their careers as they try to track down those responsible for the horrific murder of a young woman after her body turns up in a concrete and wooden box in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body
programme.desc: The disappearance of a 17-year-old girl leads detectives to an investigation spanning two decades; the case soon goes cold, but gets a renewed push after three women escape Ariel Castro's Cleveland house of horrors.

programme.title: I Went Undercover
programme.desc: Undercover work is the most exciting, but risky part of law enforcement. However, when everyday citizens with no formal training go undercover, anything can happen. Doing the right thing has never been more dangerous.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You
programme.desc: Tales of soured romances are explored in this true-crime documentary series, where loved ones turn against each other, leading to fatal consequences. Fraught with jealousy, betrayal, infidelity and anger, each episode focusses on a respective murder, brought to life with dramatic reconstructions and interviews with law enforcement and those with connections to the case. The series examines the incomprehensible outcomes of failing relationships, with emotionally charged partners taking the marital expression, till death do us part, far too literally.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: A person suddenly and unexpectedly disappears; no trace, no clues, nothing but the lingering mystery they leave behind. According to the FBI's National Crime Information Center, there are now 110,484 active missing persons cases in the U.S., 53% are juveniles under the age of 18. Most of us have heard of the high-profile cases, such as Natalee Holloway, Stacey Peterson, and Chandra Levy. But have you ever heard of Mae Catherine Rocker, Alexis Peterson or Thomas Jay Kerr? Probably not. They are just a few of the hundreds of thousands of people in this country who one day, simply Disappeared. Most missing person's stories have never been told...until now. Disappeared is an exciting series that investigates the disappearance of these victims, who are here one minute, gone the next. Each episode focuses on one victim's story, as told through the perspectives and actual voices of their closest friends and family and the investigators trying to solve the case. Through interviews with family, friends, police, and searchers, each episode recounts the actions, thoughts, circumstances and motivations that led to each person's disappearance. Experience the victim's final hours until they vanished. Watch interviews with experts, from psychologists to forensic specialists to psychics, who will offer new insights into what may have happened in each case, whether the person was a victim of foul play or a runaway. Disappeared will take you inside the world of the missing, where a person can vanish without a trace, investigators race against the clock to solve a mystery, and the victim's anguished family and friends are left to wonder what in the world could have happened.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: In the middle of the night at his home in Clearwater, Florida, eight-year-old Zachary Bernhardt disappears. His mother was taking a quick late night dip in their apartment's pool, then went to check on him but found that he wasn't in his bed. There is no sign of a break in or struggle, and suspicions swirl around the single mother, who denies any involvement in her son's disappearance and ends up moving away. But when another boy goes missing from the area, new theories emerge as the quiet beach town is gripped by fear. After sixteen years of not knowing what happened, Zachary's family and local law enforcement continues to search for answers.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery and People magazine partner to re-examine some of the most high profile crime cases in recent history. The one-hour series brings viewers tales of betrayal, buried secrets and unsung heroes, ripped from the pages of one of the nation's top weekly magazines. These stories transcended news and became part of pop culture, revealing shocking twists, new evidence, and unexpected resolutions. Interlaced within every episode are exclusive interviews with People's journalists, archival footage, re-creations, and firsthand accounts by those closest to the investigations.

programme.title: Hunt For the Missing: Chicago
programme.desc: When Jerrica Laws vanishes from Park Forest, Illinois, Detective Childs finds cryptic clues, a secret meeting, and wonders what Jerrica was hiding.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults
programme.desc: Compelling and disturbing documentary series that examines shocking stories of people who were in various cults, lured by promises of eternal life, but ended manipulated, abused and deceived. Journalists of ''People'' magazine will explore dangerous and unsettling world of cults through the eyes of survivors who were lucky enough to escape. Take a look at what happens behind closed doors of cults such as world-famous Jonestown, The Word of Life Church, The Tony Alamo Ministries, Yahweh Nation, Army of God, and many others.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: As a hurricane hits Houston, a mother disappears. With resources strained and leads thin, authorities call in Texas Ranger Jim Holland for help.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Horrifying true stories of individuals who committed some of the most shocking crimes led by basic human instincts and the seven deadly sins. Criminal behaviour expert Darren Kavinoky offers his professional analysis of each case. The intriguing and suspenseful stories are told using dramatic reenactments. Discover what happens when wrath, greed, sloth, pride, lust, envy and gluttony take over.

programme.title: Hunt For the Missing: Chicago
programme.desc: When Jerrica Laws vanishes from Park Forest, Illinois, Detective Childs finds cryptic clues, a secret meeting, and wonders what Jerrica was hiding.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: A person suddenly and unexpectedly disappears; no trace, no clues, nothing but the lingering mystery they leave behind. According to the FBI's National Crime Information Center, there are now 110,484 active missing persons cases in the U.S., 53% are juveniles under the age of 18. Most of us have heard of the high-profile cases, such as Natalee Holloway, Stacey Peterson, and Chandra Levy. But have you ever heard of Mae Catherine Rocker, Alexis Peterson or Thomas Jay Kerr? Probably not. They are just a few of the hundreds of thousands of people in this country who one day, simply Disappeared. Most missing person's stories have never been told...until now. Disappeared is an exciting series that investigates the disappearance of these victims, who are here one minute, gone the next. Each episode focuses on one victim's story, as told through the perspectives and actual voices of their closest friends and family and the investigators trying to solve the case. Through interviews with family, friends, police, and searchers, each episode recounts the actions, thoughts, circumstances and motivations that led to each person's disappearance. Experience the victim's final hours until they vanished. Watch interviews with experts, from psychologists to forensic specialists to psychics, who will offer new insights into what may have happened in each case, whether the person was a victim of foul play or a runaway. Disappeared will take you inside the world of the missing, where a person can vanish without a trace, investigators race against the clock to solve a mystery, and the victim's anguished family and friends are left to wonder what in the world could have happened.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: A mysterious body is discovered in the woods near a mobile home park in Port New Richey, Florida. After some process of elimination and discovery of evidence, the body is identified as Judy Therianos. Investigators at Pasco County Sheriff's Office make a break in the case after uncovering surveillance footage from a liquor store, where Therianos and an unknown male are seen together. This unknown male quickly becomes the prime suspect, but as the detectives continue their investigation, three people come forward and disclose information that leads to an arrest.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: Retired Pasco County Pastor and avid coin collector, Billy Shuler, was reported missing by his wife after he went out one morning to meet with a prospective client and never returned home. A search is immediately ordered, and detectives find Schuler's abandoned van in an industrial parking lot, wherein the van's GPS system leads to the body. But even though progress was being made, the case went cold. After a year, police find an unlikely connection between several bank robberies and Shuler's murder, leading to the final conclusion of the case.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: In the days following Christmas in 2003, on Whidbey Island - a picturesque tourist destination off the coast of Washington State - Russel Douglas is found shot between the eyes, in his car parked along a deserted road. It's the beginning of a case full of twists and turns that no one sees coming. This case will take investigators a decade to solve, and will leave many on this island with lingering questions.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: This team of detectives are determined to detain the dangerous killers that they are faced with. What may initially seem like the "perfect murder" requires a great depth of investigation and dedication, but eventually the detectives crack them open and reveal the truth. The key to their success is their great level of persistence, and imaginative investigative skills. Dead ends won't deter the team, when a seemingly impossible case lands on their desks, they always find a way in the end.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: For every psychopath there are signs. Would you see them? Revisiting some of the most dangerous killers in modern history to see which psychopathic traits they exhibited. Featuring real archive footage.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: An officer response to a 911 call placed by a robber on the lam who feels compelled to turn himself in. When the officer arrives at the scene, the criminal confesses to much more than breaking and entering.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: When police question a man in the disappearance of his pregnant ex-girlfriend and her young son, they discover he has a terrifying capacity for violence. And later, could a seemingly innocuous man searching for a missing girl be a real-life monster?

programme.title: Murder In the Heartland
programme.desc: This series focuses on the dark underbelly of the American mid-west, its heartland. Each episode deals with a specific murder that's been commited in one of the small towns that make up this iconic region of the US with the locals enhancing the tales and bringing clues to our attention. The show includes interviews with the victim's family, friends, law enforcement officers and also provides dramatic reenactments to bring the stories to life. Episodes reveal true stories such as when an Oklahoma family's dog drops a human skull onto their porch and the police are called in to investigate; a bride-to-be who discovers her betrothed shot in the head in their living room; a beloved father, son and fiancee who is discovered beaten to death in his own driveway; and a devoted family man who diappears after his truck is set on fire.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: Evil casts a shadow. That shadow spreads outward for years, even decades, after a crime. It consumes everyone in its path, pulling them into darkness. Can they find the light? Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death explores the endless reach of evil, a reach that extends long after the act of evil itself. This original series highlights the struggle to survive as innocent people find themselves caught in the wake of death and evil.

programme.desc: ''Dead of Night'' features nail-biting true stories of victims working the graveyard shift who are thrust into real-life nightmares. A killer lies in wait to strike the most vulnerable, those alone in the dark. When the sun sets, the body count will rise.

programme.title: The Tech Bro Murders
programme.desc: The mysterious murder of millionaire David Coffin comes back to haunt a software consultant as he mounts a campaign for governor.

programme.title: The Tech Bro Murders
programme.desc: A retired Silicon Valley executive dives into the wine industry, but a risky partnership with a bold Napa entrepreneur leads to bloodshed.

programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: The body of a promising young radio host turns up on the side of the road in south Houston. When Detective Brian Harris arrives to determine who wanted the second-generation immigrant dead, he uncovers a tragic tale of love and deceit.

programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: In American Detective, Kenda trades in his own case files to bring viewers astounding investigations from across the country, with each episode featuring a different homicide detective whose tireless efforts helped put a killer behind bars and bring justice for the victim.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: On "The Dead Files," Cindy Kaza, an evidential medium, and Steve DiSchiavi, a retired NYPD homicide detective, join forces to investigate paranormal activity in haunted locations across the United States. Their unique talents combine to create a powerful team that aims to unravel the mysteries of the supernatural world. With a blend of psychic intuition and investigative skills, Kaza and DiSchiavi explored the boundaries between the living and the dead, seeking answers to unexplained phenomena that defy conventional explanations. Their captivating narratives offer viewers a glimpse into the uncharted territories of the afterlife, bridging the gap between this world and the next.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK
programme.desc: Chilling reality series in which paranormal investigators Nick Groff and Katrina Weidman enclose themselves in some of the most haunted locations in the UK for 72 hours, in order to investigate paranormal activities. Using state-of-the-art investigative technologies, they will explore properties such as Shepton Mallet prison, the Royal Oak pub, Newsham Park hospital, Hinchingbrooke house, Margam castle,... to find out if the stories of strange occurences are true and to uncover what lies beyond the boundaries of our reality. Their mission will be dangerous, because mentally and physically exhausted, they will be vulnerable to whatever lives in these possessed buildings.

programme.title: Dream Boxing
programme.desc: DREAM BOXING stands as one of the most successful boxing promotions companies in the Europe for one reason: We take care of our fighters and our fans. It's a practice we continue to this day,as we further expand the DREAM BOXING brand while introducing the sport of boxing to a new generation of fans. Our fighters hail from around the world, attract a global audience, and span the ranks, from up-and-coming prospects to title contenders to world champions. We discover new talents, having a huge experience in amateurs ring, world and europe champions.

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: American Chopper is an American reality television series that revolves around the Teutuls- Paul Senior, his sons Paul Junior and Michael who work together at Orange County Choppers, a custom motorcycle fabrication company located in Montgomery, New York. The series is a mix of competition and drama, famous for real fighting, cursing, crying, welding, and painting. It's indisputable that each Teutul is a gifted mechanic, engineer and designer, they put together a motorbike in front of the viewers and make every customer's wish come true.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: The show follows extreme-cleaning specialist Matt Paxton, dubbed the "King of Hoards," as he wades into America's most cluttered homes in search of hidden treasures. Think "American Pickers" meets "Hoarders," with a dash of financial gamble thrown in for good measure.

programme.title: The Great Antiques Challenge
programme.desc: The dealers compete to find a baker's table for a family kitchen. Plus, they search for Victorian industrial salvage for a restaurant owner.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Buy, repair and restore and then resell a classic car in order to make profit- this is what Wheeler Dealers is about. The budget is limited, though you can see some exclusive and rare cars. Mike Brewer, a British dealer chooses the car carefully and hands it over to the mechanic, first Edd China, later Ant Anstead to be fixed and upgraded. The hosts are real masters of their trade, it seems they can bring life even to a piece of metal. It does not matter if you are a life-long car enthusiast or do not even have a driving license you will admire the results of hard work from the beginning to the end of the long uneasy restoring process.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard is a modern-day treasure hunter searching the back roads of the UK to discover hidden riches. With demanding customers, high turnover and one of the biggest decorative salvage yards in the UK, Drew is constantly on the road, crisscrossing the country in search of derelict gems and forgotten remnants. Drew loves the thrill of the hunt and while he gets his hands dirty in the country's architectural backwaters, his crack team of restorers is back at the shop giving old and rare finds a new lease on life. Follow Drew and his crack team of specialists on a fascinating journey through the entire picking process – from the initial expedition, to renewal, and finally to resale. Showcasing his hard-earned knowledge and appreciation of salvage and restoration, each episode accompanies Drew on one big buying venture, such as setting off with an empty van and returning with a 20th century stained glass Gothic doorway from an Irish monastery – as well as the small, unpredictable adventures along the way. Simply discovering a treasure is only half the battle, as Drew must artfully convince owners to sell, and at his price. After a successful purchase, Drew and his team of experts bring the items back to Fabulously British Salvage, his tremendous 20,000 square foot showroom located in North Wales, to restore them to their original brilliance, before reselling them for profit. This is not an easy business, as any trip can feature the next great find or a bust that costs Drew and his team thousands. However, Drew's keen eye and adroit negotiating skills are second to none – his passion and drive for success make him one of the best in the business.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard and Paul Cowland travel across the United Kingdom to uncover classic cars to buy, restore and sell on for a profit. The pair scour garages, barns and facilities to discover collectible cars which include the likes of the Morris Minor Traveller, Jaguar XJS, Rover P6 and a BMW 635 CSI among many others. The combination of Drew's expertise of negotiation and deal-making and Paul's extensive mechanical knowledge makes them a formidable team ready to tackle anything challenging that comes their way.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how things that surround us every day are produced? Find out about the whole process from the beginning to the end in a documentary television series How It's Made. The series demonstrates how various items like clothing and accessories, food, industrial products, cars, musical instruments and many more are manufactured. Who would have thought how exciting it would be to watch a cupcake, formula 1 race car or gummy vitamins being made?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: As the modern world becomes progressively automated and mechanised it's easy to become detached from how things are made and how they work. The hit series returns to uncover the miraculous feats of engineering which underpin life in the 21st century. How the seemingly mundane are often the result of highly sophisticated engineering and production processes. This fascinating behind-the-scenes journey delves deep into the production of everyday modern items from surfboards to satchels and trombones to cricket bats.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers
programme.desc: Expert craftsmen are bringing Drew Pritchard's finds back to life and restore them to their former glory. Drew hunts for treasures such as derelict gems and forgotten remnants across the country. And then he and his team do the restoration turning trash to gold, so that worn objects become shining gems for which Drew's customers want to pay a lot of money. All kinds of items can and will be restored, starting from a century-old suitcase to an ancient coffee machine, from a ravaged carousel horse to a large railway clock.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: Mike Whiteside and Robert Kulp are the hosts of Salvage Dawgs show that is about saving beautiful old things from buildings planned to be torn down. They and their talented crew teach the viewers how to repurpose old stuff into something new and useful instead of throwing it away. So if you are remodeling your home think twice before you get rid of anything. Get creative, have some fun and learn tips and tricks to help you build your skills. Learn how to transform old chairs into a functional bench, how to repurpose an old paneled door into a shelf and enjoy fantastic vintage pieces from the past.

Take a look at some absolutely gorgeous houses on the white sand with a magnificent view of the sea, a dream of each and everyone.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Buy, repair and restore and then resell a classic car in order to make profit- this is what Wheeler Dealers is about. The budget is limited, though you can see some exclusive and rare cars. Mike Brewer, a British dealer chooses the car carefully and hands it over to the mechanic, first Edd China, later Ant Anstead to be fixed and upgraded. The hosts are real masters of their trade, it seems they can bring life even to a piece of metal. It does not matter if you are a life-long car enthusiast or do not even have a driving license you will admire the results of hard work from the beginning to the end of the long uneasy restoring process.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: This reality TV show follows Marty Raney and his two children, Matt Raney and Misty Bilodeau, who are successful homesteaders from the state of Alaska and have the skills needed to fish, hunt, raise livestock, and otherwise survive in an untamed landscape. Struggling homesteaders across the country call these experts to help them save their homesteads and become self-sufficient while they teach them the necessary skills to survive the wilderness.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: This reality TV show follows Marty Raney and his two children, Matt Raney and Misty Bilodeau, who are successful homesteaders from the state of Alaska and have the skills needed to fish, hunt, raise livestock, and otherwise survive in an untamed landscape. Struggling homesteaders across the country call these experts to help them save their homesteads and become self-sufficient while they teach them the necessary skills to survive the wilderness.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: Unique American reality series that follows a group of friends in Utah- David ''Heavy D'' Sparks, David ''Diesel Dave'' Kiley, and their crew at ''DieselSellerz'' who sell parts for diesel trucks and jeeps, repair and customize pickup trucks. They design and build some of the biggest and most amazing diesel powered vehicles you will ever see, and also do truck giveaways. Watch as they create these awesome masterpieces and enjoy all the crazy adventures they get into while doing it.

programme.title: Garage Rehab
programme.desc: American petrol head and reality TV star, Richard Rawlings, famous for his show Fast N' Loud, visits struggling garages and car workshops that are desperate for a helping hand. Alongside the team of world-class mechanics from his Gas Monkey Garage, Richard invests his precious time and money to get these toiling businesses back where they belong. The team visit workshops all over the USA, using their knowledge and experience to rev up the old girls and get their engines purring once more. With a serious amount of elbow grease on top of the help from Richard's team, the owners have a shot once more at a successful business.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How Do They Do It? Ever wondered how the stripes get into toothpaste or how contact lenses are made? How do goods get from one country to another and then into our supermarkets? What are car tires made from and exactly why are plasma TV screens flat? Eating, drinking, driving, flying. These all are activities that we carry out with barely a second thought. But have you ever wondered what exactly goes into your teabag and how it got there? How does an airport handle hundreds of thousands of items of luggage each day? And just how can a car's airbag inflate so quickly? Every day – often without even realizing it – we come into contact with technology, be it in the bathroom, in the car or on the golf course. We take a look at how things work, and focus on some of the most amazing examples of everyday objects including the world's fastest elevator and the most expensive chocolate money can buy.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how things that surround us every day are produced? Find out about the whole process from the beginning to the end in a documentary television series How It's Made. The series demonstrates how various items like clothing and accessories, food, industrial products, cars, musical instruments and many more are manufactured. Who would have thought how exciting it would be to watch a cupcake, formula 1 race car or gummy vitamins being made?

programme.title: Border Control Sweden
programme.desc: Niklas talks to a man who really doesn't remember how many units of alcohol he is bringing. Tomas takes the time to teach a lesson at Arlanda.

programme.title: Border Control Sweden
programme.desc: Alex talks to a man acting strange and when checking the man's luggage, he finds something even more strange. A German couple lies about what is in their trunk.

programme.title: Border Control: Turkey
programme.desc: Elite teams battle smugglers at Turkey's land, air, and sea borders in a nonstop fight to protect national security.

programme.title: Inside the Arrest
programme.desc: British police make 2,000 arrests a day, but one bad move can endanger them and jeopardise a whole investigation. Experts analyse footage of the most dramatic arrest footage, revealing the detailed planning that goes into each operation.

programme.title: Late Night Lockup
programme.desc: When the sun sets, the strangest suspects pass through police stations, and officers encounter their weirdest and wildest behavior. Direct access to body cams and CCTV takes viewers along for the ride with police who must deal with insanity after dark.

programme.title: Late Night Lockup
programme.desc: When the sun sets, the strangest suspects pass through police stations, and officers encounter their weirdest and wildest behavior. Direct access to body cams and CCTV takes viewers along for the ride with police who must deal with insanity after dark.

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: American Chopper is an American reality television series that revolves around the Teutuls- Paul Senior, his sons Paul Junior and Michael who work together at Orange County Choppers, a custom motorcycle fabrication company located in Montgomery, New York. The series is a mix of competition and drama, famous for real fighting, cursing, crying, welding, and painting. It's indisputable that each Teutul is a gifted mechanic, engineer and designer, they put together a motorbike in front of the viewers and make every customer's wish come true.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard is a modern-day treasure hunter searching the back roads of the UK to discover hidden riches. With demanding customers, high turnover and one of the biggest decorative salvage yards in the UK, Drew is constantly on the road, crisscrossing the country in search of derelict gems and forgotten remnants. Drew loves the thrill of the hunt and while he gets his hands dirty in the country's architectural backwaters, his crack team of restorers is back at the shop giving old and rare finds a new lease on life. Follow Drew and his crack team of specialists on a fascinating journey through the entire picking process – from the initial expedition, to renewal, and finally to resale. Showcasing his hard-earned knowledge and appreciation of salvage and restoration, each episode accompanies Drew on one big buying venture, such as setting off with an empty van and returning with a 20th century stained glass Gothic doorway from an Irish monastery – as well as the small, unpredictable adventures along the way. Simply discovering a treasure is only half the battle, as Drew must artfully convince owners to sell, and at his price. After a successful purchase, Drew and his team of experts bring the items back to Fabulously British Salvage, his tremendous 20,000 square foot showroom located in North Wales, to restore them to their original brilliance, before reselling them for profit. This is not an easy business, as any trip can feature the next great find or a bust that costs Drew and his team thousands. However, Drew's keen eye and adroit negotiating skills are second to none – his passion and drive for success make him one of the best in the business.

programme.title: Mighty Truckers
programme.desc: This real-life road show follows the lives of twenty truckers from four different countries - Poland, Italy, Germany and the Netherlands. These unique and diverse characters will show the viewers the world of transport, introducing them with the profession of "truck driver". Who are these men and women who ensure that we get various goods on time day and night? What makes them choose the life on the road? This show will answer these questions in an "up close and personal" portrait of trucker life.

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: Documentary series that follows the work of some of the world's biggest and most highly-skilled shippers, who are responsible for keeping the world's cargo ships on the move 365 days a year. There are at least 20 million shipping containers crossing the world's seas at any given time as 90% of world trade is transported by water and, as mega ships now dominate global waters, big money is at stake. From shipping tens of thousands of luxury cars, multi-million dollar yachts, to a 20 ton shipment of sweet potatoes, the audience will have a chance to see ground crews use precision engineering, top-of-the-line machinery, and nerves of steel to on-load and off-load these precious, but very different cargoes, conquering various on-the-spot challenges from miscalculations to malfunctions.

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: Documentary series that follows the work of some of the world's biggest and most highly-skilled shippers, who are responsible for keeping the world's cargo ships on the move 365 days a year. There are at least 20 million shipping containers crossing the world's seas at any given time as 90% of world trade is transported by water and, as mega ships now dominate global waters, big money is at stake. From shipping tens of thousands of luxury cars, multi-million dollar yachts, to a 20 ton shipment of sweet potatoes, the audience will have a chance to see ground crews use precision engineering, top-of-the-line machinery, and nerves of steel to on-load and off-load these precious, but very different cargoes, conquering various on-the-spot challenges from miscalculations to malfunctions.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Following custom car legend Javier "Shorty" Ponce and his Texas-based crew that designs and builds ground-up classic car restorations, the series showcases the Latino community's decades-long influence on car customization in America.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Following custom car legend Javier "Shorty" Ponce and his Texas-based crew that designs and builds ground-up classic car restorations, the series showcases the Latino community's decades-long influence on car customization in America.

programme.title: The Autobahn A2
programme.desc: Using the example of the 473-kilometre long Bundesautobahn 2 between Oberhausen and Berlin, the work of firefighters, doctors, police and customs is presented. On the highway there are also construction sites, rest areas and the work on roads and bridges is shown and portray tourists, travelers and truckers.

programme.title: The Autobahn A2
programme.desc: Using the example of the 473-kilometre long Bundesautobahn 2 between Oberhausen and Berlin, the work of firefighters, doctors, police and customs is presented. On the highway there are also construction sites, rest areas and the work on roads and bridges is shown and portray tourists, travelers and truckers.

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild is not an exact science. Beyond the basics of finding water, food, shelter and eventually help, opinions vary. Two experts tell how they think it's done. Equipped with minimal gear, the pair are left in remote locations where they battle the elements and sometimes each other.

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild is not an exact science. Beyond the basics of finding water, food, shelter and eventually help, opinions vary. Two experts tell how they think it's done. Equipped with minimal gear, the pair are left in remote locations where they battle the elements and sometimes each other.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Gold Rush is a reality television series that follows the placer gold mining efforts of various family-run mining companies in boundless north of America. The series focuses on the work process in the conditions of permafrost and working relations between the participants. The show has 10 seasons altogether. In some episodes participants start the adventure and travel to Alaska to search for gold because of financial issues. They do not have any previous experience and have to learn on the job. Then there appears several gold mining teams that compete with each other. In some episodes the teams move to South America. Admire the courage and determination of the team members in their unstoppable desire to become rich.
