programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Join our hosts, adventurer Josh Gates, scientist Phil Torres and paranormal researcher Jessica Chobot, as they travel around the planet uncovering the secrets behind supernatural phenomena, mythical beasts and alien activity. Each trip leads the team on a quest to reveal the bizarre truth of these fascinating stories. Epsiodes include a journey deep into the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster from a lost city; a spelunking expedition sees the team investigating the largest cave system in the world; an active volcano in Washington state might hold the clue to some extraterrestrial mysteries; and an exploration of a haunted dwelling in the Amazon causes panic in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Was the Hindenburg truly destroyed by accident or by sabotage? Could the famous Patterson-Gimlin Bigfoot footage hold clues that only modern analysis can define? What really happened when 50,000 Persion soldiers disappeared without a trace in 524 B.C.?

programme.title: Hunting Atlantis
programme.desc: Does the Lost City of Atlantis really exist? Atlantis has fascinated philosophers and historians for nearly 2,400 years and is known as one of the most extraordinary mysteries of the world. With a new trail of evidence, expert Stel Pavlou and volcanologist Jess Phoenix set out on a quest to solve the greatest archaeological mystery of all time - the rediscovery of Atlantis.

programme.title: Hunting Atlantis
programme.desc: Stel and Jess search ancient underwater ruins off the coast of Greece and follow the trade routes of the Minoan civilization to a circular island and the heart of a volcano where a modern city now sits atop what could be the ruins of Atlantis.

programme.title: Scrappers
programme.desc: Trading scrap metal is like playing the stock market. From a small collection point, scrap metal goes a long way to collect and segregate before it reaches the furnace. The steel mills order batches of appropriately selected and prepared raw materials in a specified quantity and time. To trade scrap metal, you must have the ability to do business as well as luck. This program invites you to meet people who work in scrap yards all over Poland.

programme.title: Too Large
programme.desc: With the help of bariatric surgeon Dr. Procter, morbidly obese individuals attempt to lose weight in order to change their lives forever; they face challenges as they work to reinvent their lifestyles.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters
programme.desc: With an average weight of over 1000lbs, nothing can support the Slaton sisters like they can support each other. With hopes of a healthier life, the sisters embark on a journey to drop enough weight that they qualify for a life changing bariatric surgery. Without the surgery, Amy will never be able to become a mother like she dreams of, and Tammy will be bedridden. After meeting with medical experts, the sisters strive to reach their goal but drama ensues as they struggle to stick to their healthy diets. Will the Slaton sisters stay on the right track and turn their lifestyles around?

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: Amber and Trent Johnston are living the American dream. They have been happily married for 14 years and have five children ranging from 6 to 13 years old. On paper, they might seem like your average family...yet in person, they attract a lot of attention.... because all seven members of the Johnston family – Amber, Trent, their two biological children, Jonah and Elizabeth, as well as their three adopted children, Anna, Emma and Alex – happen to have Achondroplasia Dwarfism. Together, these spunky seven make up the largest known family of Achondroplastic dwarfs in the world, and even describe themselves as "the real life seven dwarfs."

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric Waldrop, their three older boys and sextuplet babies are a tight-knit family living on a sheep farm in small town Alabama. Their strong desire for one more baby resulted in the biggest possible surprise- sextuplets. Have a close look at this adorable family and all of its members starting from the days when there were "just" five of them. Risky pregnancy, premature birth, arriving home, taking care of six babies, managing the whole family and adjusting to the new pace of life- all of this and much more are there for the viewers.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Poland
programme.desc: Stefano and the consultants have a big star in the salon as Polish pop star Doda enters the fray. The other lucky ladies include plus-sized Katarzyna and dancing girl Joanna.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: Hosted by Buddy Valastro, this cooking program takes various Italian-American dishes from Valastro's own family recipes and shows how they can be prepared in minimal time and using ingredients that are easily obtainable and affordable. Each meal usually consists of a main course, a side dish and a dessert and Buddy is joined in the kitchen by members of his family to show us how it's done and to add authenticity. Episodes feature Buddy and his wife Lisa making chicken Sorrentino with fusilli with a side of asparagus and chocolate dipped strawberries for dessert for date night; Auntie Anna revealing her secret recipes for manicotti and her chicken with vinegar peppers; or Buddy and his cousin Frankie reminiscing about the sights and food of Italian street fairs. The recipe for each dish can be found on the show's website.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance
programme.desc: Buckle up, TLC and 90 Day Fiancé fans! Hot off their upcoming appearance on 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER?, fan-favorites Pedro and Chantel and their lively in-laws will be the focal point of a spinoff series from the 90 DAY FIANCÉ franchise called THE FAMILY CHANTEL, premiering Monday nights this July. Ever since Chantel first introduced Pedro to her family under the false pretense of him coming to America on a student visa, the drama that followed has kept fans obsessed. From their beginnings on 90 DAY FIANCÉ season four through 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER, Pedro and Chantel have weathered major marital ups and downs involving everything from feisty family members to their own trust issues. Viewers will follow this unique modern family as they try to move past their differences and come together as an extended family, but as Chantel's parents Karen and Thomas try to protect their brood, will they push their children too far? The family members featured in the upcoming series include Chantel's parents Karen and Thomas and siblings River and Winter, as well as Pedro's mother Lidia and sister Nicole.

programme.title: Jay & Pamela
programme.desc: Follows a couple, Jay and Pamela, who happen to share the same rare brittle bone disorder. With plans to marry and a goal to live more independently, Jay and Pamela are determined to build the life of their dreams together.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlo's Bakery in Hoboken New Jersey create elaborate, elegant and interesting edible art cakes. Cake Boss follows the team, led by Buddy Valastro, as they design and create two of these masterpieces for all kinds of events and occassions. The show explores the intricacy of working with your family, and their interpersonal relationships with other employees. Watch as they create everything from classic wedding cakes to alien spaceships.

programme.title: Say Yes To the Dress With Tan France
programme.desc: Tan helps Gemma find the confidence to follow her heart. Plus, professional mermaid Jasz wants more than a fishtail!

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole help a single dad of three who wants to honor his late wife by carrying out her vision for their home. They look to take on the meaningful renovation with a new kitchen and living room and give the kids the bedrooms they deserve.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Kody Brown, with his four wives Meri, Janelle, Robyn and Christine and their combined 17 children, attempt to navigate life as a "normal" family in a society that shuns their lifestyle. From their unconventional family structure and living arrangements to financial challenges, each half hour episode exposes the inner workings of a polygamist household, revealing the unexpectedly tight-knit and loving relationships between Kody's wives. The series also captures the intense dynamics surrounding a man juggling three wives while attempting to keep it a secret from the outside world- but the general public is not the only challenge that the Brown family unit is facing.

Ever since Chantel first introduced Pedro to her family under the false pretense of him coming to America on a student visa, the drama that followed has kept fans obsessed. From their beginnings on 90 DAY FIANCÉ season four through 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER, Pedro and Chantel have weathered major marital ups and downs involving everything from feisty family members to their own trust issues. Viewers will follow this unique modern family as they try to move past their differences and come together as an extended family, but as Chantel's parents Karen and Thomas try to protect their brood, will they push their children too far? The family members featured in the upcoming series include Chantel's parents Karen and Thomas and siblings River and Winter, as well as Pedro's mother Lidia and sister Nicole.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Poland
programme.desc: The contributors in the salon include business coach Magda with her friend, actress Barbara Kurdej-Szatan, Daddy's little girl Marta, and shopaholic and fashionista Karolina.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: Hosted by Buddy Valastro, this cooking program takes various Italian-American dishes from Valastro's own family recipes and shows how they can be prepared in minimal time and using ingredients that are easily obtainable and affordable. Each meal usually consists of a main course, a side dish and a dessert and Buddy is joined in the kitchen by members of his family to show us how it's done and to add authenticity. Episodes feature Buddy and his wife Lisa making chicken Sorrentino with fusilli with a side of asparagus and chocolate dipped strawberries for dessert for date night; Auntie Anna revealing her secret recipes for manicotti and her chicken with vinegar peppers; or Buddy and his cousin Frankie reminiscing about the sights and food of Italian street fairs. The recipe for each dish can be found on the show's website.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlo's Bakery in Hoboken New Jersey create elaborate, elegant and interesting edible art cakes. Cake Boss follows the team, led by Buddy Valastro, as they design and create two of these masterpieces for all kinds of events and occassions. The show explores the intricacy of working with your family, and their interpersonal relationships with other employees. Watch as they create everything from classic wedding cakes to alien spaceships.

programme.title: Cake Boss

Cake Boss follows the team, led by Buddy Valastro, as they design and create two of these masterpieces for all kinds of events and occassions. programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on newlyweds with a specific design sensibility they want to see reflected in their world travels. The DeBoers look to create a custom design that matches the couple's experiences and also provides space to grow their family.

programme.title: Unexpected: Teenage & Pregnant
programme.desc: This programme aims to explore the complicated issues that can happen when teenage pregnancy suddenly happens. Focusing on three girls, the camera captures each trimester and the first few weeks of parenthood. Each couple is completely unprepared for what is about to happen when they become parents which is where each set of grandparents comes in handy. Tensions become high as everyone has their own set of rules on what the "perfect" parent should be like and what the future beholds for the young parents to be.

programme.title: Match Me Abroad
programme.desc: Katarina questions Harold's honesty on his profile. Stanika lands in Morocco and makes Nina join her first date ever. Nathaly is desperate to find love in Colombia before her traditional Sri Lankan family steps in to arrange it for her.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Definitely not created for the squeamish, Dr Pimple Popper features dermatologist and Internet celebrity Dr. Sandra Lee as she treats patients suffering with unique skin conditions such as facial and skin disorders. Including the extraction of blackheads, cysts and uncovering new skin conditions that audiences may not have known of before, Dr. Sandra Lee started uploading content onto Youtube and Instagram, gaining a lot of popularity by people enjoying spots and cysts being popped. Those included within her videos gave written permission for her to record and post the content in exchange for discounted or free-treatments. Dr. Pimple Popper is on a mission to reclaim the lives of those suffering with these unusual and rare skin condition and remove their embarrassment.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: Criss-crossing the globe, 'Body Bizarre' embarks on a voyage of discovery unlike any other. From India's child snake charmers to the world's hairiest girl, this series uncovers the real human stories behind the headlines. With deeply personal interviews and footage from the most unusual of day-to-day routines, it's an adventure through the truly astonishing. Six-year-old Liu Jiangli was abandoned by her parents as a two-year-old after being born with large black spots and fur on her face and body. Connie Culp became the first American to undergo a face transplant in 2008, after being shot in the face by her ex-husband. These stories, and others, explore what life is like for some of the world's most extraordinary individuals.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on newlyweds with a specific design sensibility they want to see reflected in their world travels. The DeBoers look to create a custom design that matches the couple's experiences and also provides space to grow their family.

programme.title: Match Me Abroad
programme.desc: Katarina questions Harold's honesty on his profile. Stanika lands in Morocco and makes Nina join her first date ever. Nathaly is desperate to find love in Colombia before her traditional Sri Lankan family steps in to arrange it for her.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: Amber and Trent Johnston are living the American dream. They have been happily married for 14 years and have five children ranging from 6 to 13 years old. On paper, they might seem like your average family...yet in person, they attract a lot of attention.... because all seven members of the Johnston family – Amber, Trent, their two biological children, Jonah and Elizabeth, as well as their three adopted children, Anna, Emma and Alex – happen to have Achondroplasia Dwarfism. Together, these spunky seven make up the largest known family of Achondroplastic dwarfs in the world, and even describe themselves as "the real life seven dwarfs."

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric Waldrop, their three older boys and sextuplet babies are a tight-knit family living on a sheep farm in small town Alabama. Their strong desire for one more baby resulted in the biggest possible surprise- sextuplets. Have a close look at this adorable family and all of its members starting from the days when there were "just" five of them. Risky pregnancy, premature birth, arriving home, taking care of six babies, managing the whole family and adjusting to the new pace of life- all of this and much more are there for the viewers.

The recipe for each dish can be found on the show's website.

programme.title: Say Yes To the Dress: Lancashire
programme.desc: It's the dress that all little girls dream of, and one that most will only get chance to pick out once. A fairy tale occasion that has the ability to make dreams come true. It's also the source of tantrums, tears and arguments all wrapped up in tulle and satin with an intricate beading. A bride's journey to picking out that perfect wedding gown is a near military operation. Luckily, Gok Wan has joined the expert bridal consultants at Ava Rose Hamilton's Boutique in Lancashire to help an abundance of brides-to-be track down their dream dress. But, with budgets to consider, personal issues, dramas and the opinions of the entourage, will Gok be able to help these brides find their perfect gown?

programme.title: Welcome To Plathville
programme.desc: Welcome To Plathville is an American reality series following husband and wife Kim and Barry Plath, and their nine children; Ethan, Hosanna, Micah, Moriah, Lydia, Isaac, Amber, Cassia, and Mercy. Apart from Ethan and Hosanna, who live with their respective spouses, the family reside on a rural farm in Georgia, where the children must abide by Kim and Barry's conservative rules. No sugar, no television, no non-religious music and no video games, the children must follow their parents' strict guidelines, as family life centres around music and God. We follow the family through their daily routines, revealing all the drama that ensues with having so many children.

programme.title: Love & Translation
programme.desc: The series brings three American men and 12 international women together on a remote paradise island for a chance at finding romance. And here's the twist: none of the women speak English and none of the men speak other languages. Without being able to speak to one another and without the use of translators, the singles need to count on their senses to help develop their connection and determine the power of their chemistry and attraction.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design
programme.desc: Interior designer Nate Berkus is joined by his husband, fellow designer Jeremiah Brent, as hosts of this home renovation show. Both designers use their undisputed skills to help out homeowners who are stuck in the middle of horrendous home improvement nightmares and who are facing financial ruin because of it. Their aim is to turn the homeowner's money pit into a major asset. Each hour-long episode features a different renovation problem and the two designers use unique design pieces and their own personal touch to add character and value to each project. The series also invites the viewer into the couples' private life to show they cope with raising their daughter, Poppy, "the girl that changed everything.".

programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.desc: Follow a group of people from the series ''90 Day Fiancé'', whose international relationships fell apart, as they embark on a new adventure, and start going on dates in an attempt to find love - again. Some of audience's favourites - Big Ed, Colt, Danielle, Molly, and others, are searching for someone new, and you can join them on their journey.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: An intimate look into the lives of our couples told from their perspective. Without producers or crew, the cast films their day-to-day lives as they continue to navigate the COVID-19 pandemic and all of the challenges it brings to their relationships.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper

Some of audience's favourites - Big Ed, Colt, Danielle, Molly, and others, are searching for someone new, and you can join them on their journey.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The residences come together, combining old wisdom with youthful strength to ensure the future of Port Protection. Sam, Carl and Troy build a vital log hauler for their future homesteads. Curly is hungry for some heart and liver, so he hunts the rainforest for a young buck. Squibb and Chris build a significant upgrade to their infrastructure. Oliver and Breanna continue on their quest to harvest a bear.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 6316 is en route to Seoul with a load of non-hazardous cargo. But shortly after takeoff, the pilots struggle to navigate the skies above Shanghai. The controller notices the plane isn't climbing to its assigned altitude. And within minutes, the MD-11F disappears from radar altogether and slams into a residential neighborhood. The massive impact registers the equivalent of a 1.6-magnitude earthquake, destroys the flight data recorder, and claims the lives of five civilians and the three-man crew. Investigators from China, South Korea, and the US join forces, and are soon able to rule out both mechanical issues and sabotage. It's only when they reconstruct the flight in a simulator that the mystery begins to unravel—and they come to a startling realization.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: Radio silence between pilots and air traffic controllers can mean many different things, but only the physical evidence can reveal the true story. Three shocking cases send investigators hunting for answers. A Greek airliner goes rogue and crashes outside Athens. A China Airlines 747 disappears from radar and the culprit is discovered on the ocean floor. And, when controllers lose contact with a private jet, fighter planes scramble to intervene.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyone's favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Highliner makes millions of cod fillets each year; Peanut Chews, a nutty candy bar; and Moxie, a soda that spawned its own adjective. On this episode of Food Factory USA: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, Highliner transforms mountains of cod into 300 million ready-to-eat fillets every year; meet Peanut Chews, the nutty Philadelphia-born candy bar that's been around for ages; and New England's Moxie soda is so cool it spawned its own adjective.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And what's the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And what's the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: In 1995, a bone of an extinct bear is found in a Slovenian cave that could rewrite our place in the story of evolution. The bone appears to be carved with intention by someone at least 10,000 years before humans arrived in that part of the world. Who made it and why? A simple black dress shoe sits in a glass case in the Heinz Nixdorf Museums Forum in Germany. The reason? More than just a shoe, this is a high-tech machine for its time, designed to do the impossible: beat the casino. And an intricate purple gemstone adorned with silver snakes, quartz scarabs and cryptic words, has a long history intertwined with illness, ruin, tragedy and death. Where did it originate, and could it really be cursed?

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: In 1898, a stunning object shows up at the British Museum. Carved and polished from a single piece of quartz, it is shaped like an immaculate human skull. Is this a creation of Mesoamericans, as originally claimed? Why is it rumoured to possess supernatural power? A gruesome-looking chair from ancient China, housed at the Wellcome Collection in London, is covered in sword blades, spikes and ornate decorations. Clearly, this is no love seat. Is it some kind of torture device, or more than meets the eye? From a long-buried library in the lost Assyrian city of Nineveh comes a peculiar round tablet scribbled with cuneiform writing. Is it the work of astronomers, proof of an ancient apocalypse, or a 3,000-year-old instruction manual?

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: As thunder rumbles and rain pours, maintenance teams carry out urgent post winter repairs, but lightning forces them inside. A hardworking ground support engineer struggles to keep flights on time in the worsening rain. Repairs on a faulty 787 go to the wire. A ramp team has an hour to re-load an entire plane's cargo, and two dogs receive special treatment enroute to their loved ones.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: Spring break brings a surge in passenger numbers and added pressures on airport staff and infrastructure: heavy bags rip a section of the baggage conveyor belt which needs fixing before the afternoon rush. A low-cost-holiday jet with millions of miles on the clock needs a new engine. Staff must race passengers from a delayed flight to their jet headed for the Caribbean, and an elite restaurant along with staff on the apron feel the heat as passenger numbers soar.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The volatile climate of Southeast Alaska challenges Port Protection's residents who live on the edge of society. Gary battles father time while securing needed resources. Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle he's ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Lawless Island

Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle he's ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Lawless Island

Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle he's ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes another crack at backcountry bridge building, but this time she's determined to use the Yukon's harsh conditions to her advantage. Resolved to thrive in the Northwoods, Billy tries his hand at building a blacksmith's forge. Emilie and Gilbert make the most of the frigid temperatures and begin work on a summertime necessity. Locked in the depths of a Newfoundland winter, Matty takes to the sea in search of a new supply of firewood.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot, caught off guard by an unplanned litter of puppies, prepares to leave her Yukon trapline early. In need of metal for his new forge, Billy embarks on a backwoods salvage mission. With their supply of meat running low, Emilie and Gilbert hit the trail for a late-season caribou hunt, and in an effort to embrace his new island lifestyle to the fullest, Matty takes to sea and tries his hand at scallop fishing.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: An ice jam has severed the remote community of West Dawson from emergency services, leaving residents trapped. A 911 call comes in from across the river, and Chief Mike and his team of volunteers face a nightmare scenario. With no safe routes in or out, volunteer firefighter Chris must brave the treacherous makeshift trails across unstable ice. A terrifying accident on the way home forces an unconventional team of volunteer first responders to come to the rescue. Meanwhile, in Whitehorse, a fierce blizzard batters the highways, burying vehicles and leaving travellers stranded. As conditions spiral into chaos, Ray makes an urgent call for reinforcements, knowing that time is running out for those caught in the storm's icy grip.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Inside the American Mob
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, a hidden empire of crime, violence and power ruled the streets of New York City. The five families of the American mafia ruled, and the family bosses were untouchable. No one admits in public that the organization even existsuntil one boss decides to break the rules. Joe Colombo. Other bosses are content to run their business from behind the scenes, but Colombo wants to take the fight to the FBI. When he does, the results are disastrous for the mob. Meanwhile, a new generation of agents enters the FBI, and theyre not the usual suits. Italian-American guys who grew up in the same neighborhoods as gangsters start working for the Bureau and change the game. One of those agents is Joe Pistone, aka Donnie Brasco, who infiltrates a crime family more successfully than any other agent ever had. Its the beginning of the end for the mob, though no one knows it yet.

programme.title: Inside the American Mob
programme.desc: It is 1978, and American law enforcement is at war with the American mob. But for the first time, the FBI has a real chance to strike back. Their secret weapon, agent Joe Pistone, AKA Donnie Brasco, has infiltrated the Bonnano family and become close with known killers Lefty "Two Guns" Ruggiero and Sonny Black Napoletano. But when boss Carmine Galante is gunned down in broad daylight, Pistones life changes. Hes about to become a made man, but hell have to kill before he receives that honor. Over in the Colombo family, newly made man Michael Franzese is making huge money. Millions. But with big money comes a lot of attention, and he becomes suspicious of his own family -- matters take a turn for the worse when his own father betrays him.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. As conditions spiral into chaos, Ray makes an urgent call for reinforcements, knowing that time is running out for those caught in the storm's icy grip.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: Avalanche technicians race to repair a remote weather station before an incoming storm. The escalating risks force them to carry out a bombing mission to flush out a dangerous buildup of snow above the Klondike Highway. Meanwhile, Dawson City is left reeling from the loss of the person they rely on the most to keep them safe. In Whitehorse, Ray embarks on a remote, high-stakes rescue mission along a snow-covered back road, only to get stuck himself as daylight dwindles and temperatures plummet.

programme.title: Trafficked with Mariana van Zeller
programme.desc: Mariana investigates a deadly new fentanyl cocktail called "tranq dope" that's devastating American users. She's spent her career covering the deadly waves of the country's opioid crisis, but she's never seen it this bad. Seeking answers, she heads to Sinaloa, the heart of Mexico's cartel land, to get answers, and makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Trafficked with Mariana van Zeller
programme.desc: A cartel murder in a small Georgia town launches Mariana's investigation into the true reach of Mexican organized crime in America. The results are shocking. From hundreds of small-town drug cells to high-level corruption, she exposes how cartels move drugs, launder billions, and even infiltrate law enforcement. It's a growing influence that's fueling violence and addiction across the country.

programme.title: Trafficked with Mariana van Zeller
programme.desc: Mariana heads for a lawless region in Southeast Asia to investigate a diabolical scamming operation. Criminal groups are luring workers from across the world with the promise of good jobs, only to hold them prisoner and force them to scam. It's part of a multibillion-dollar industry known as the "pig butchering" scam — and countless Americans have fallen victim.

programme.title: The Truth Behind
programme.desc: Crystal Skulls - mysterious artefacts found around the world that have captured the imagination of new age enthusiasts and esteemed academics alike. One skull in particular has long been the source of controversy and intrigue. The Truth Behind Crystal Skulls looks specifically at the provenance of the Mitchell-Hedges Crystal Skull, claimed to have been discovered in Belize in the early 20th Century. The program answers the questions that continue to mystify its proponents. Is it a contemporary object of art? Is it an ancient Mayan artefact dating to over 3000 years ago? This adventurous documentary finds the answers by delving in to the murky past of the skull and taking us on a journey through the streets of Beijing, the jungle of Belize and the cities of Washington DC and London UK to discover the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind
programme.desc: UFO's. Everyone's heard about them - but what are they exactly? The Truth Behind travels to the unofficial UFO capital of the world to investigate. Charting the rise of UFO sightings from the 1940's to the present day, the investigation examines the conspiracy theories, conducts a stakeout in the desert, looks into a recent sighting, and takes a field trip to a crash site in Nevada might unearth some clues. We'll hear the experiences of a man who's flown in a real flying saucer and has got the footage to prove it. All to find the Truth Behind UFOs.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Is It Real? sorts the facts from fiction in modern-day myths about supernatural phenomena. The show explores some of the more common myths such as crop circles and ghosts, as well as some of the far out myths like spontaneous human combustion. The series looked at these topics from a skeptical point of view, going at them with the attitude of, "Oh yeah? Then prove it." Frequently, the people making the more outrageous claims could not.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Lawless Island

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: Spatial disorientation is one of the leading causes of all air accidents. Even the most experienced pilots are susceptible to its subtle yet deadly effects. A confused John F. Kennedy Jr. disappears on the way to Martha's Vineyard. High over the Red Sea, a captain loses his bearings and crashes his passenger jet. And, off the coast of Indonesia, pilots fly their Boeing 737 into a violent storm and end up on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyone's favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyone's favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: From the earliest colonization attempts to now, hurricanes have wreaked havoc along the North American coast. Exploring the wreckage reveals surprising truths about the continent's history. Through the remnants of a 16th century Spanish galleon, a mysterious pile of revolutionary era cannons, and hundreds of submerged New York subway cars, scientists are uncovering how hurricanes have shaped America's past - and how they might impact its future.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: When Mt. Vesuvius erupted 2000 years ago, it buried the towns of Pompeii and Herculaneum. Today new discoveries are revealing a detailed timeline of the final heart-breaking moments of the citizens trapped in its aftermath. Archaeologists are finding that many of those who didn't survive belong to a previously hidden world of enslaved peoples, a forgotten class of ordinary people vital to ancient Roman society.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on 63 year old Kel's 1962 Triumph TR4. Kel bought his beloved British roadster back in the 1970s and it became the car of his youth, he simply couldn't be parted from it - even when it finally gave up the ghost and ended up in storage - it was never far from his thoughts. His planned restoration sadly ground to a halt when a series of family tragedies and a brutal stroke that robbed him of most of his vision - meant that any plans to get his car back on the road were dashed. Tim and Fuzz steal the car away but quickly realise that they've taken on one of the biggest jobs in Car SOS history.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Northern Ireland to take on a 1972 Generation 1 Toyota Celica a rare Japanese coupe that has seen better days. The car's owner is 50 year old Celica obsessive Noel who bought the car with a plan to restore it and use it as his daily driver. However Noel's whole life took a turn for the worse when he suffered a series of spinal injuries that lost him his job, his home and put his dream car restoration on hold for good.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on the restoration of a lightweight British pocket rocket , a 1997 Lotus Elise. The car's owner, 44 year old former print manager Sarah, had been planning to get the car back on the road with the help of her dad Phil until double tragedy struck - he fell victim to incurable bowel cancer then sadly Sarah herself was also diagnosed with cancer. The car's restoration was put on hold. Mother Jenny wrote in to Car SOS hoping to bring back her daughter's much needed smile.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Space shuttle Columbia, the Deepwater Horizon oil rig, and the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear power plant are three major disasters linked to engineering and design flaws. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design choices that turned failures into catastrophes. What turned Columbia's return into a disaster? Why didn't the oil rig's final defenses hold? And how did a massive wave defeat emergency backups?

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: A construction crane in the heart of New York City, Italy's iconic Morandi Bridge, and a multistory department store in Korea — three major disasters linked to engineering errors. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design flaws that spiraled into structural collapse. How does a series of oversights, design flaws, and negligent decisions lead to deadly catastrophes?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: King Herod is reviled as one of the most evil characters in the Bible, responsible for the horrific "massacre of the innocents" in his efforts to kill the infant Jesus Christ. But later historians coin him "Herod the Great." Now, immersive CGI and new archaeological discoveries—on land and deep underwater—reveal the truth about this Biblical villain.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Israel, archaeologists investigate the truth behind one of the greatest discoveries in history: the Dead Sea Scrolls. Found in 1947 deep in the Judean desert, this remarkable haul of 2,000-year-old manuscripts includes the oldest copies of the biblical texts ever found. But no one knows who wrote them or why they were hidden. In this episode, investigators combine traditional excavations with revolutionary analytical technologies to uncover new evidence that could help solve these mysteries. Cutting-edge imaging techniques reveal hidden clues in the scrolls — which could help identify the authors — while archaeological discoveries in Jerusalem paint a picture of a brutal, destructive event that would tear apart the ancient Jewish world around the time the scrolls were hidden.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Drug-trafficking is risky business. In Airport Security Colombia and Peru, suspects try to evade detection. A couple traveling to Punta Cana is not what they seem. The man risked it all for money. A woman carrying cocaine on her body did it to start a business and help her family. A first-time carrier hiding cocaine in traditional handicraft mats gambles and loses. A Syrian man uses false documents twice, hoping to reunite with family in Europe.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Clueless carriers, and people betrayed. Officials from Airport Security Colombia and Peru must remain vigilant. A woman's boyfriend asks her to carry bottles. She has no idea they contain liquid cocaine. A man with cocaine in his suitcase claims his son-in-law is responsible. A US woman may have been tricked into drug-trafficking. A construction worker is given a bag with cocaine. Of two Ukrainian friends, one claims to have tricked the other.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Flight: TAM Airlines Flight 402; Fokker 100; October 31st, 1996. Just seconds after lifting off from Congonhas airport in Sao Paulo, Brazil, TAM Airlines flight 402 slams into a residential neighborhood and bursts into flames killing all 95 people on board. Investigators from the Brazilian Air Force join forces with the U.S. National Transportation Safety Board to uncover a series of events that led to a failure so rare, it seemed impossible.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. How does a series of oversights, design flaws, and negligent decisions lead to deadly catastrophes?

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster
programme.desc: The series investigates historically relevant human-made and natural disasters from the last century. Each episode is dedicated to a particular gruesome accident, every minute of which is thoroughly analyzed and studied in order to present the reasons for its occurrence and circumstances of it. The program uses re-enactments, interviews with witnesses and survivors, and CGI to show the viewers how it happened in reality. All this is done to draw viewer's attention to these issues so that we make sure they won't happen again in the future.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: At 1.23AM on April 26th,1986 a massive explosion rips through reactor number four at Chernobyl nuclear power plant in the Soviet Ukraine. A safety test has triggered the worst nuclear accident in history, releasing 400 times more radiation into the atmosphere than the Hiroshima bomb. While control room operators reel in shock, the nuclear plant's firefighters battle the blaze amidst lethal levels of radiation. Just 3km away in the local town of Pripyat, Communist party officials encourage life to go on as normal. Children go to school and couples get married while radiation rains down on them. Meanwhile a giant radioactive cloud starts to circle the globe. Episode 1 follows the first 24-hours of the disaster, with first-hand accounts from people desperately trying to make sense of an accident no one thought could ever happen.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: On 28th April, fire still rages in what's left of reactor number 4. Helicopter crews trying to put it out are bombarded by massive doses of radiation. Soviet authorities finally order the evacuation of local residents, and 50,000 people are forced to leave their homes. They are told to take enough for 3 days, but they will never come back. Frontline firefighters suffering acute radiation burns are locked in wards controlled by the KGB. Many will die within days. In Sweden high levels of radiation alert the rest of the world to a radioactive cloud sweeping across Europe - evidence of a massive nuclear accident in the USSR. But the Soviet authorities remain silent. Episode Two charts the first two weeks after the meltdown, revealing the human cost of the accident, and the Soviet efforts to conceal the true scale of the disaster.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Highway Havoc!
programme.desc: Journey through the unforgiving and inhospitable climate of Norway's frozen mountains with the elite rescue crews who come to the aid of stranded travellers and battle round-the-clock to maintain access to vital road links. With sudden changes in the weather, from torrential rain to snow blizzards and sudden temperature changes, the teams have their work cut out for them. Risking life and limb in some of Europe's harshest conditions, it takes a special breed of men and women to overcome the many challenges thay face on a daily basis. As the roads turn into icy bobsleigh tracks, haulage container vehicles and private cars and vans all get themselves into difficulties and need to be rescued by our road warrior heroes.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Drug-trafficking is risky business. In Airport Security Colombia and Peru, suspects try to evade detection. A couple traveling to Punta Cana is not what they seem. The man risked it all for money. A woman carrying cocaine on her body did it to start a business and help her family. A first-time carrier hiding cocaine in traditional handicraft mats gambles and loses. A Syrian man uses false documents twice, hoping to reunite with family in Europe.

A construction worker is given a bag with cocaine. Of two Ukrainian friends, one claims to have tricked the other.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard stops smugglers with over 13,000 kilos of cocaine at sea and transfers custody to Homeland Security Investigations for prosecution. At Dulles International Airport, near the nation's capital, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers uncover weapons heading outbound during checks for unreported currency. In El Paso, CBP Agricultural Specialists inspect live and deceased animals to protect the U.S. from foreign diseases, like avian flu.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Air and Marine Operations in St. Thomas arrest a suspected smuggler and chase a vessel fleeing into British Virgin Island waters. U.S. Customs and Border Protection busts a mother-daughter duo smuggling large amounts of marijuana through Miami International Airport to the Caribbean. In El Paso, alerts from the K9 at the Sierra Blanca checkpoint lead U.S. Border Patrol agents to the discovery of drugs and guns in multiple vehicles.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The volatile climate of Southeast Alaska challenges Port Protection's residents who live on the edge of society. Gary battles father time while securing needed resources. Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle he's ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Football: Serie A. Verona - Milan
programme.desc: Coverage of Italy's top-flight football league.

programme.title: Football: Serie A. Juventus - Bologna
programme.desc: Coverage of Italy's top-flight football league.

programme.title: Football: Bundesliga. Bayern - Stuttgart
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the week's action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: Football: LaLiga. Oviedo - Villarreal
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Football: DFB Pokal. 1/2 final. Stuttgart - Freiburg
programme.desc: Report of matches from the German DFB-Pokal

programme.title: Football: LaLiga. Real Betis - Real Madrid
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Korvpall: EuroLeague. Play-In. AS Monaco - FC Barcelona
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Vanity Fairi saladused
programme.desc: Hulkur Texasest on väidetavalt pannud toime sadu jõhkraid mõrvu. Üks toimik teise järel saab suletud ja ta mõistetakse surma. Kuid mõned uurijad kahtlevad, kas trellide taha sai ikka tegelik tapja. Kas on võimalik, et külmavereline mõrvar on jätkuvalt vabaduses?

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Märulikomöödias kavatsevad Schmidt ja Jenko oma noorukieaprobleemid selja taha jätta. Nad lähevad tööle politseisse, salajasse Jump Streeti üksusesse. Nende nooruslik välimus on hea kattevari ja nii saadetakse nad kohalikku keskkooli salatööle. Relvad ja ametimärgid vahetatakse koolikottide vastu, et uurida vägivaldset ning ohtlikku narkovõrgustikku. Keskkool pole aga kaugeltki selline, mille semud mõne aasta eest lõpetasid. Kumbki ei arvanud, et neil tuleb uuesti rinda pista pubekaea hirmude, ängi ja probleemidega, mis olid nende jaoks juba unustatud teema.

programme.title: Punane sekund
programme.desc: Kas rehvid on ohtlikus liiklusolukorras elupäästjaks või altvedajaks, sõltub nende seisukorrast. On inimlik loota, et midagi halba ei juhtu, kuid siin tuleb mängu halastamatu füüsika. "Punane sekund" aitab rehvid üle vaadata.

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.title: Minu pere mõrvamüsteerium. Juhtum lõpetatud?
programme.desc: Sasha ja Jeremy uurivad uuesti tapmist tulirelvast 1937. aastal, kui praamkapteni mõrvar väidetavalt tema parim sõber.

programme.title: Minu pere mõrvamüsteerium. Juhtum lõpetatud?
programme.desc: Advokaadid uurivad kurikuulsat juhtumit "Mees, keda ei suudetud üles puua", milles majateenijat süüdistatakse 1884. aastal Devonis oma kõrgklassi heategija mõrvas.

programme.title: Minu pere mõrvamüsteerium. Juhtum lõpetatud?
programme.desc: Jeremy ja Sasha vaatavad uuesti läbi Victoria ajast pärit keerulise juhtumi, milles oli neli kahtlusalust, kaks kohtuprotsessi ja lõpuks vaid üks mõrvas süüdistatud ja üles poodud mees.

programme.title: New Yorgi mõrvad
programme.desc: Chelsea'i massitulistamises hukkub üks ja saab haavata kolm inimest. Selgub, et see pole üksikjuhtum, vaid osa mõrvaseeriast erinevatest ringkondades. Uurijad leiavad end New Yorgi ööelu ja väljaviskajate allilmast.

programme.title: New Yorgi mõrvad
programme.desc: NYPD uurijad peavad kiiresti lahendama ühe kriminalisti mõrva, enne kui kaval kurjategija riigist põgeneb.

programme.title: Kuriteopaikade koristajad
programme.desc: Readingi korterist leitakse ehk aasta vanused inimsäilmed. Phoenixi pargis lastakse mees maha. LA elurajoonist leitakse surnukeha.

programme.title: Motellimõrvad
programme.desc: Motelli toateenija leiab ühe külalise surnukeha ja lahang kinnitab, et too oli mõrvatud. Ohvri auto on ärandatud ning politsei peab võidujooksu ajaga, et leida tapja enne, kui ta uuesti ründab; salapärane juhtum tuleb lahendada piiratud hulgal asitõendite abil.

programme.title: Tapja motiiv
programme.desc: Virginias otsivad ühe pere liikmed meeleheitlikult kadunud teismelist pereliiget, teadmata, et politseil on saladus: nad leidsid ta surnukeha, kuid keelduvad teavet avaldamast, sest nad avastavad erakordse motiivi.

programme.title: Vanity Fairi saladused
programme.desc: Bikrami jooga on üks maailma levinuimatest joogastiilidest, kuid mitme naise väitel on selle looja Bikram Choudhury neid seksuaalselt ahistanud ja isegi rünnanud. Kuidas sai tervendajast seksuaalkiskja?

programme.title: Pühademõrvad
programme.desc: Pärast seda, kui hundimaski kandev mees naise ja tema veel sündimata lapse halloweeni ajal surnuks pussitab, peavad uurijad kogukonda rahustama ja mõrvari leidma, enne kui ta uuesti ründab.

programme.title: Esimesed 48 tundi
programme.desc: Kui Atlantas lastakse nooruk maha 80 m kauguselt, paljastab uurija Darrin Smith vihavaenu, millel on oht kogu naabruskond lõhestada.

programme.title: Kuriteopaikade koristajad
programme.desc: Readingi korterist leitakse ehk aasta vanused inimsäilmed. Phoenixi pargis lastakse mees maha. LA elurajoonist leitakse surnukeha.

programme.title: Motellimõrvad
programme.desc: Šerifibüroosse DeRidderis Louisianas tehakse muret tekitav telefonikõne Dee's Moteli omaniku poolt, kes on toast nr 6 leidnud surnud naise.

programme.title: Terasmees
programme.desc: Kassahitt! Maa satub tulnukate rünnaku alla ja ühtäkki on inimkonna viimane lootus ühe mehe õlul. Clark Kent saadeti imikuna siia ühelt hukkuvalt planeedilt ja ta kasuvanemad ei reetnud poisile kunagi ta tegelikku päritolu. Tema erakordsete supervõimete tõttu peeti Clark'i veidrikuks, kellest hoiti eemale. Alles nüüd, kus Clark on sirgunud täismeheks ja meie koduplaneet satub kohutavasse hädaohtu, saab temast kangelane Superman. Tema ainsaks liitlaseks selles ebavõrdses lahingus saab noor reporter Lois.

programme.title: Kuriteopaikade koristajad
programme.desc: Newcastle'is on trepikoda pärast jõhkrat pussitamist verega koos. Phoenixis on politseiautod täis okset, verd ja hullematki. Baton Rouge'i narkourkas on mehel nuga.

programme.title: Esimesed 48 tundi
programme.desc: Kui 90-aastast sõjakangelast tulistatakse selga, tuleb välja, et võti juhtunu asjaolude väljaselgitamiseks võib olla tema endise naabri käes ning ühe noore mehe tulevik katkeb järsult, kui plaan kiiret tulu teenida rappa läheb.

programme.title: Mõrvarlikud sugulased
programme.desc: Kui mees leitakse oma baarist jõhkralt mõrvatuna, avaneb aastate jooksul varjul olnud mõrvamüsteerium. Uurijad usuvad, et tegemist on nurja läinud äritehinguga ja peavad juhtumi lahendamiseks sellele vankumatult pühenduma.

programme.title: Võmmid
programme.desc: Jalgrattur peab politseinikku ekslikult vargaks ja püüab põgeneda põõsaste varju. Politsei halastab pereisale ja tolle auto jäetakse teisaldamata. Kaks õde jäävad liikluskeerises tülitsedes politseile silma.

programme.title: Võmmid
programme.desc: Eakas autojuht ohverdab põgenemiskatse käigus oma kaubiku. Auto kinnipidamine paljastab oodatust rohkem. Mitu autos olijat veenduvad, et kõige parem on kohe tõtt rääkida.

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.title: Kuldvillak
programme.desc: Eesti armastatuim mälumäng, kus vastused saavad uued küsimused. Põnev kaasaelamine ja võimalus ka kodus kaasa nuputada. Saatejuht on Eeva Esse-Sõõrumaa.

programme.title: Kaks kanget Indias
programme.desc: 1,5-miljonilise elanikuga Varanasi linna kitsastel tänavatel tunnevad end hästi nii lehmad, kitsed kui ka pühad mehed. India ühe vanima linna auks, uhkuseks ning palverännakute sihtpunktiks on Gangese jõgi. Üheaegselt seal ujutakse, pestakse pesu, viiakse läbi pühasid riitusi, maetakse surnuid ning aerutatakse paatidega veel. Tegemist on maailmaga, mida Lääne kultuurist tulnud inimesel on päris lõpuni keeruline mõista. Kuid emotsioonide tulv, mis saadakse, jätab oma jälje mõlemale reisimehele. Saatejuhid on Teet Margna ja Kristjan Jõekalda.

programme.title: Grand Tour
programme.desc: Saatejuhid saavad ülesande muuta autod sotsiaalmeedia abiga noortele atraktiivsemaks. Kellel õnnestub kõige rohkem paparatsosid kokku meelitada? Eboladroomil võtavad mõõtu 8ondate Itaalia superautod Ferrari testarossa ja Lamborghini Countach LP5000. Kolmik selgitab välja ka parima uue kiire luukpära - VW Polo GTI.

programme.title: Meeldejääv kuritegu
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA, 1968: Cheryl Perveler leitakse tema kollasest sportautost, kuulihaav peas. Kahtlusalusena peetakse kinni tema ekspolitseinikust abikaasa Paul. Kohtuprotsess käivitab noore LA prokuröri Vincent Bugliosi karjääri, kes sai hiljem tuntuks Charles Mansoni protsessiga.

programme.title: Motellimõrvad
programme.desc: Politsei kutsutakse Pennsylvanias asuva Fallsi väikelinna New Fallsi motelli, kus vigastuste järgi saab õige pea selgeks, et 39-aastane ohver ei surnud südamerabandusse.

programme.title: Motellimõrvad
programme.desc: Reno politseijaoskonna inspektorid kutsutakse La Quinta Inni, kust leitakse 23 kuulihaavaga 42-aastase naise surnukeha. Juhtumi lahendamisel määrava asitõendi annab ohvri poeg.

programme.title: Esimesed 48 tundi
programme.desc: Tulsas Oklas lastakse maha mees, kui tapja näeb võimalust, mis on liiga hea, et seda kasutamata jätta. Atlantas viib üle käte läinud tüli ühe mehe surmani ja teise mehe ohtu sattumiseni.

programme.title: Esimesed 48 tundi
programme.desc: Parklas toimunud uimastitehing päädib kahe Atlanta mehe elu nõudva tulevahetusega ja Tulsa külje all Okla motellis toime pandud hukkamisstiilis tapmine viib edasi veel ühe mõrvani, kui tapja avastab, et tema teol oli pealtnägija.

programme.title: Kuriteopaikade koristajad
programme.desc: Londonis pussitatakse teismeline surnuks, Louisianas on narkolabor plahvatusohus ja Phoenixis aetakse autode kokkupõrkes jalakäija alla.

programme.title: Kuriteopaikade koristajad
programme.desc: Worksopis ootavad koristajaid mädanevad jäätmed ja uimastite tarvitamiseks kasutatavad vahendid. Florida kuumuses lebab vakladega kaetud laip ja Baton Rouge'is immitseb matkabussi põrandast verd.

programme.title: Kuriteopaikade koristajad
programme.desc: Buckinghamshire'is leitakse kahtlastel oludel surnud mees. Phoenixis leiab aset ahelavarii, mistõttu on maantee verd täis. Mississippi sillalt leitakse auto alt surnukeha.

programme.title: Grand Tour
programme.desc: Ringreis viib kolmiku Gruusiasse ja aserbaidžaani. Enam kui 1000-km teekond viib nad Mustast merest Kaspia pereni ja toob välja valitud autode - Aston Martin DBS Superleggera, Bentley Continental GT ja uue 8. seeria BMW tugevused ja nõrkused. Katse tõestab, et tavaliikluses on autode kiirusevahe olematu.

programme.title: Batman vs Superman: Õigluse koidik
programme.desc: Kultuslik fantaasiamärul! Auhinnatud linaloos on ühele pildile mahutatud kaks suursugust kultuskangelast - Batman ja Superman. Kartes, et keegi ei kontrolli jumalat meenutava superkangelase tegusid, astub Gotham City hirmuäratav ja võimas õigusemõistja ise vastu suurlinna kõrgesti austatud kaasaegsele päästjale, kuni ülejäänud maailm püüab selgusele jõuda, millist kangelast nad tegelikult vajavad. Samal ajal kui Batman ja Superman on omavahel sõjajalal, kerkib esile uus hädaoht, mis seab inimkonna suuremasse ohtu kui kunagi varem.

programme.title: Mehe raev
programme.desc: Inglismaa, USA 2018 märul Lavastaja:Guy Ritchie Osades:Jason Statham, Post Malone, Scott Eastwood, Josh Hartnett, Jeffrey Donovan Salapärane ja tõsine uus rahaauto turvamees üllatab kaastöötajaid, kui röövi käigus oma oskused käiku laseb. Meeskond imestab seepeale, kes ta on ja kust ta pärit on. Täpsuslaskuri eesmärgid selguvad peagi, kui ta arvete klaarimiseks dramaatilisi ja lõplikke võtteid kasutab.

It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS: One Championship. ONE Friday Fights 151
programme.desc: ONE Championship is a mixed martial arts (MMA) organization that showcases world-class fighters from across the globe. With a focus on martial arts values and a commitment to integrity, the league promotes adrenaline-pumping, action-packed fights that entertain and inspire fans worldwide. ONE Championship not only showcases the skills of elite fighters, but also highlights the cultural aspects of martial arts, making it a unique and captivating sporting experience.

programme.title: Korvpall: EuroLeague. Play-In. AS Monaco - FC Barcelona
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: LaLiga. Atletico Madrid - Athletic Bilbao
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. programme.title: Vanaaegne õigus
programme.desc: Kuningas William Rufus sai 1100. aastal jahipidamise ajal nooletabamuse. Jaapani viimase Minamoto šoguni Sanetomo mõrvas 1219. aastal tema vennapoeg väljaspool pühamut.

programme.title: Kadunud viikingi otsingud
programme.desc: Kanada maadeavastajatest pere paljastab ebamugava tükikese ajaloost ja avastab, kas viikingid jõudsid kaugemale Põhja-Ameerika sisemaale varem, kui on ajaloos kirja pandud.

programme.title: Mõrtsuklikud monarhid
programme.desc: Kas mõned ajaloo enim sarjatud kuningad olid tõepoolest halastamatud mõrtsukad? Paljastame tõe, mis peitub Caligula, Ivan Julma, Henry VIII, John Maata, Nero ja Herodes Suure kohta käivate müütide taga.

programme.title: Pommitaja: teise maailmasõja terror
programme.desc: Sõjaajaloos on olnud rida leiutisi, mis on muutnud lahingute pidamise viisi, kuid üks relv ei muutnud mitte ainult lahinguvälja, vaid sõda ennast: pommitaja.

programme.title: Neetud aarded
programme.desc: Oma ala juhtivad eksperdid püüavad lahti harutada põnevate ja hukule määratud objektide, sealhulgas Tutanhamoni hauakambri, terrakotaarmee, Hope Diamondi ja merevaigutoa saladust.

programme.title: Neetud vereliinid
programme.desc: Vaid loetud filmides peaosa mängida jõudnud Bruce Lee on popkultuuris kultusliku tähtsusega kuju. Lee suri sama noorena ja sama ootamatult, nagu tema poegki. Kuidas saavad nende traagilised saatused olla nii sarnased?

programme.title: Neetud vereliinid
programme.desc: Üks maailma rikkamaid mehi, Aristoteles Onassis, jättis endast maha hulganisti murtud südameid, kuid ükski neist naistest ei lennutanud meest rambivalgusesse nii, nagu abielu Jacqueline Kennedyga.

programme.title: Salajased natside baasid
programme.desc: Kolmanda riigi kokkuvarisemine jättis endast maha võrdselt saladusi ja reliikviaid, mis on varjul ehitistes üle maailma. Mida rohkem vaataja neist baasidest teada saab, seda enam juurdleb ta, kuidas teine maailmasõda võinuks sootuks teisiti kulgeda.

programme.title: Salajased natside baasid

programme.title: Teise maailmasõja salarelvad
programme.desc: Sarjas uuritakse, kuidas teine maailmasõda kiirendas tehnika arengut, mis viis reaktiivlennukite ja kosmoserakettide ehitamiseni. Igas osas vaadeldakse lähemalt eri relvi ja sõjaaegset inseneritööd.

programme.title: Rindejoonel
programme.desc: Jaanuar-mai 1944. Monte Cassino otsas on klooster, mida keelati sõjaliselt kasutada. Ometi purustati see hoone täielikult ja seal hukkus üle 200 000 inimese.

programme.title: Tank: II maailmasõja ülim relv
programme.desc: Teises maailmasõjas ülekaalu saavutamiseks peetud võitluses osutus tank asendamatuks relvaks; alates võimsatest Tiiger-tankidest ja lõpetades väledate Shermanidega - need olid masinad, mis muutsid lahingukäiku.

programme.title: Teine maailmasõda: Impeeriumi hind
programme.desc: Saksamaa üritab Britannia õhulahingus Suurbritannia tuge ära lõigata. Luftwaffe tõrjutakse tagasi, ent välksõda algab siiski. Saksamaa siirdub oma Põhja-Aafrika liitlasi toetama.

programme.title: Teine maailmasõda: Impeeriumi hind
programme.desc: Sõda Euroopas muutub, kui Hitler 1941. a 22. juunil operatsioon Barbarossa käivitab. Natside sissetung Nõukogude Liitu on alanud.

programme.title: Teine maailmasõda: Impeeriumi hind
programme.desc: Jaapani väed okupeerivad Lõuna-Vietnami ja Kambodža. Ent sõda muudab põhjalikult 7. detsember, kui Jaapani lennukid Pearl Harboris ankrus seisvat USA Vaikse ookeani laevastikku ründavad.

programme.title: Teine maailmasõda: Impeeriumi hind
programme.desc: Jaapani sõjategevus idas osutub laastavalt efektiivseks, ent hoolimata nende edust on nende vältimatu lüüasaamine aimatav. Nad äratasid unest USA sõjalise jõu.

programme.title: Natsid: Kurjuse niidid
programme.desc: Näeme, kuidas segased ajad majanduses, haavatud rahvuslik uhkus ja nn karismaatiline juhtimine põhjustasid teise maailmasõja ajal enneolematult jõhkraid tegusid, mida kujundasid Hitlerile kõige lähemal seisvad mehed ja naised.

programme.title: Hitleri kurjategijad
programme.desc: Vaatame lähemalt Hitleri propagandaministri Josef Goebbelsi väärastunud mõistust; tema viis läbi Saksamaa ajupesu, mis sillutas teed holokausti jaoks.

programme.title: Salajane natsiteadus
programme.desc: Natside triumfaalne arhitektuur viitab tugevalt düstoopilisele tulevikule. Milline oleks võinud olla natside linn ja maailm, kui Hitleril oleks õnnestunud oma vastased purustada?

programme.title: Tank: II maailmasõja ülim relv
programme.desc: Teises maailmasõjas ülekaalu saavutamiseks peetud võitluses osutus tank asendamatuks relvaks; alates võimsatest Tiiger-tankidest ja lõpetades väledate Shermanidega - need olid masinad, mis muutsid lahingukäiku.

programme.title: Rindejoonel
programme.desc: Jaanuar-mai 1944. Monte Cassino otsas on klooster, mida keelati sõjaliselt kasutada. Ometi purustati see hoone täielikult ja seal hukkus üle 200 000 inimese.

programme.title: Teise maailmasõja salarelvad
programme.desc: Sarjas uuritakse, kuidas teine maailmasõda kiirendas tehnika arengut, mis viis reaktiivlennukite ja kosmoserakettide ehitamiseni. Igas osas vaadeldakse lähemalt eri relvi ja sõjaaegset inseneritööd.

programme.title: Teine maailmasõda - lahingud Euroopa nimel
programme.desc: 1944. aasta juuli. USA väed plaanivad suurt pealetungi nimetusega operatsioon Kobra. Nad kavatsevad rünnata St Lo lähistel, saavutada läbimurde, ning kasutades ära seda avalööki teha teed kindral Pattonile ja kolmandale armeele.

programme.title: Teine maailmasõda - lahingud Euroopa nimel
programme.desc: 1944. aasta september. Montgomery pakub välja julge plaani: ületada Reini jõgi ja piirata sisse Saksamaa tööstuslik sisemaa. Kui plaani saadaks elu, võiks sõda jõuluks läbi olla.

programme.title: TV3 uudised
programme.desc: TV3 uudistetoimetus võtab igal õhtul operatiivselt ja asjatundlikult kokku olulisemad päevasündmused nii Eestist kui ka mujalt maailmast. Kui igatsed uudistesaadet, mis on aktuaalne, täpne, pisut terav, südamlik ning kus saab ka grammikese nalja, siis õige valik on "TV3 uudised". "TV3 uudised" on eetris igal õhtul kell 19.00. Argipäeviti mahub tunniajasesse saatesse põhjalik ülevaade nii Eestist kui välismaalt. Räägime näiliselt keerulistest asjadest selgelt ja arusaadavalt - sest aega on. Uudistesaate juhid on Liina Kanarbik, Marek Lindmaa ja Tarmo Maiberg. Reportaaže otse sündmuskohtadelt toovad teieni Sirje Eesmaa, Allan Muuk, Sven Soiver, Virgo Pärn, Kadri Pikhof, Marie Metsur, Christina Veinberg ja Tiina Laura Kimmel.

programme.title: Kodu keset linna
programme.desc: Seriaali keskmes on Tallinnas elav perekond - noor naine, tema keskealine mees ja nende väike poeg. Sarja intriigide käivitajaks on mehe eelmine perekond. Põnevust lisavad ka naabrid, sugulased ja tuttavad. Tegevus toimub tänapäeva Eestis ning sarjas, nii nagu ka päris elus, on armastust ja vihkamist, pettumust, leppimist, armukadedust ning huumorit. Sarja peaosatäitjateks on näitlejad Eesti erinevatest teatritest. Martin Veinmann kehastab sarjas pereisa Hannest, tema noort naist Helenit mängib Kleer Maibaum, perepea esimest naist Epp Eespäev ning pereisa tütart esimesest abielust kehastab Kadri Adamson
